G–o:¶Þ??”³úvð0ÙmmÕ*Ï¦¹‹[â}–z½ƒ´üÛÆì•™=Kèƒ-»´:¬ ú‡|^îvØøKIý÷”ôìùkl¹£_;A )£¦$Ó˜ª QeƒÞ™â,ÆÈ„@ŽÎÛ'jŽ; ü™–¨mÄ˜OžÚùÐ|Ý’ºÓéŸxJô| ¡Ò6ßeu§%€ |BiQ)8—`ü?zXhD‡ 2)>Téëlä6m¿[ÊŽ¾û¦²ÌÜ5ü;é;×/ý*)ÃHë‡HÛZL< ëèõÁ9×%ÀÛšB·zîÕ·º/Mh˜ØX²†eÚŠÔÃ'üÊ°ô¾;Ïx,tëŽ…+|yÂ$EÆ ß—‰æ¤xW–ékúR ¾R²…¦ñ°ð/ñ>âšÔØ[Z€ tEXtSoftware www.inkscape.org›î< IEND®B`‚ ------MultipartBoundary--k7z3wgbwMgdVzG0MqRUwwpj3MVpc76LQZ2bn24S81y---- Content-Type: text/css Content-Transfer-Encoding: binary Content-Location: https://my.nu.edu.kz/my-main-web/css/mymain.css?v=3 @charset "utf-8"; .noborder > .x-panel-body-default { border: none; } .nopaddingbar { padding: 0px; } .noborder.x-toolbar-default { border: none; } .lightgrayed { color: rgb(204, 204, 204); } .longheader { width: 180px; height: 55px; overflow: hidden; font-size: smaller; } .w150 { width: 150px !important; } .groupheader { height: 55px; } .vertheader .x-column-header-text { transform: rotate(-90deg); display: inline-block; height: 90px; width: 90px; font-size: smaller; } .item-is-deleted .x-grid-cell-inner { color: rgb(205, 205, 205); } .item-is-inherited .x-grid-cell-inner { color: rgb(88, 75, 75); font-style: italic; } .item-is-added .x-grid-cell { background-color: rgb(255, 226, 226); } .item-is-added.x-grid-row-over .x-grid-cell { background-color: rgb(247, 224, 255); } .item-is-added.x-grid-row-focused .x-grid-cell { background-color: rgb(255, 184, 0); } .group .x-column-header-inner, .group .x-grid-cell-inner { background-color: lightblue; } .button { margin: 1px; padding: 2px; background-color: transparent; border-radius: 0px; background-repeat: no-repeat; border: 1px solid transparent; } .button:hover { border: 1px solid lightgray; background-color: rgb(245, 245, 245); } .button48 { width: 50px; height: 50px; } .button48.button-add { background-image: url("../images/add-icon48.png"); background-position: 7px 2px; } .button48.button-edit { background-image: url("../images/edit-icon48.png"); background-position: 6px 2px; } .button48.button-delete { background-image: url("../images/delete-icon48.png"); background-position: 1px 2px; } .button32 { width: 36px; height: 36px; background-position: 2px 2px; } .button32.button-add { background-image: url("../images/add-icon32.png"); } .button32.button-edit { background-image: url("../images/edit-icon32.png"); } .button32.button-delete { background-image: url("../images/delete-icon32.png"); background-position-x: 3px; } .button16 { width: 18px; height: 18px; background-position: 1px 1px; } .button16.button-add { background-image: url("../images/add-icon16.png"); } .button16.button-edit { background-image: url("../images/edit-icon16.png"); } .button16.button-delete { background-image: url("../images/delete-icon16.png"); } .button24 { width: 30px; height: 30px; background-position: 2px 2px; } .button24.button-add { background-image: url("../images/add-icon24.png"); } .button24.button-edit { background-image: url("../images/edit-icon24.png"); } .button24.button-delete { background-image: url("../images/delete-icon24.png"); } .button24.button-payments { background-image: url("../images/orange-coins-24.png"); } .service-type { margin: 5px 2px; padding: 10px; border: 1px solid rgb(221, 221, 221); } .service-type.first { margin: 0px 2px; } .service-info > .x-panel-body { background-color: rgb(239, 239, 239); } .light-border { border-color: rgb(112, 185, 237); border-width: 2px; border-radius: 0px !important; } .view-icon { background: url("/extjs-base/js/extjs/resources/ext-theme-neptune/images/tools/tool-sprites-dark.png") -1px -672px; width: 16px; height: 16px; margin-top: 3px; cursor: pointer; } .pay-icon { background: width: 16px; height: 16px; margin-top: 3px; cursor: pointer; } .view-icon.x-item-disabled, .pay-icon.x-item-disabled { cursor: auto; } .attention { margin-bottom: 10px; font-weight: bold; font-style: italic; color: red; } .esot { text-shadow: none; } .esot .x-grid-row .x-grid-cell { font: 12px tahoma, arial, verdana, sans-serif !important; } .esot .x-form-item-label, .esot .x-form-cb-label { font-size: 13px !important; } .esot .myaccount-tabs-body, .bill-popup .popup-tabs-body { margin-top: -1px; } .esot .x-tab, .bill-popup .x-tab { background-color: rgb(240, 240, 240); border: 1px solid rgb(221, 221, 221) !important; } .esot .x-tab-default-top, .bill-popup .x-tab-default-top { padding: 3px 10px 0px; color: rgb(0, 0, 0); } .esot .x-tab-top-over, .bill-popup .x-tab-top-over { background-image: none; background-color: rgb(250, 250, 250) !important; } .esot .service-item { padding-top: 3px; } .esot .service-details-panel { border: 1px solid rgb(221, 221, 221); } .esot .service-details-panel .x-header-text { font-size: 17px; color: rgb(0, 57, 173); } .esot a.pay-off-btn { border-color: rgb(16, 92, 182); border-radius: 0px; border-width: 2px; background: none !important; } .esot a.pay-off-btn:hover { text-decoration: none; background-color: rgb(250, 250, 250) !important; } .esot a.pay-off-btn .x-btn-inner { color: rgb(197, 14, 14); font-weight: 900; text-transform: uppercase; text-shadow: none; border-radius: 0px !important; } .esot .service-name { width: 100%; margin-bottom: 5px; } .esot .service-name span { font-size: 14px; color: rgb(0, 57, 173); font-weight: 900; text-transform: uppercase; } .esot a.label { text-shadow: none; font-weight: normal; background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); color: rgb(16, 92, 182); } .esot a.label.visited { color: rgb(16, 92, 182); font-weight: bold; } .esot a.label:hover { color: rgb(16, 92, 182); text-decoration: underline; font-weight: bold; } .esot .pagingtoolbar a.x-btn-toolbar .x-btn-inner { display: none !important; } .esot .pagingtoolbar a.x-btn-toolbar .x-btn-icon-el { display: block; width: 16px; height: 16px; } .esot .pagingtoolbar a.x-btn-toolbar.x-toolbar-item { border: 0px; box-shadow: none; } .esot .pagingtoolbar a.x-btn-toolbar.x-toolbar-item:hover { text-decoration: none; border: 1px solid rgb(221, 221, 221); background-color: rgb(239, 239, 239); padding-top: 2px; padding-left: 8px; } .esot .x-toolbar-default { background-image: none; } .esot .pagingtoolbar a.x-btn-toolbar.x-toolbar-item.x-disabled:hover { text-decoration: none; border: 0px; background: none; padding-top: 3px; padding-left: 9px; } .esot .x-tbar-page-number .x-form-field { padding: 0px 6px; font-size: 12px; border-radius: 3px; } .esot .x-toolbar { padding: 3px; } .list-open { background: url("../theme/images/minus.png") no-repeat; width: 24px; height: 24px; margin-right: 5px; cursor: pointer; float: left; } .list-close { background: url("../theme/images/plus.png") no-repeat; width: 24px; height: 24px; margin-right: 5px; cursor: pointer; float: left; } .paid td { background-color: rgb(222, 251, 255) !important; } .unpaid td { background-color: rgba(255, 48, 48, 0.3) !important; } .cancelled td { background-color: rgb(236, 137, 249) !important; } .refunded td { background-color: rgb(255, 241, 208) !important; } .wpsPortletBody { margin-right: 15px; } p { margin: 0px; } .x-body, li { line-height: 16px; } .x-datepicker { width: 177px; } .x-datepicker .x-datepicker-date .x-hide-clip { display: none; } .x-datepicker .x-btn { border-width: 1px; border-style: solid; border-image: initial; border-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15) rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15) rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.25); } .x-datepicker-month .x-btn { box-shadow: none; } .x-boundlist .x-boundlist-item { font-size: 12px; } table.x-datepicker-inner th { padding-right: 8px; } .paramsmonth .confirm { height: 30px; } .paramsmonth .details { margin-right: 15px; padding-top: 7px; color: rgb(134, 129, 129); } .paramsbedding .cost { padding-top: 3px; font-weight: bold; } .service-warning .x-panel-body { background-color: transparent; border-color: transparent; } .service-warning .information { left: 0px !important; } .service-warning a.label { background: transparent; color: white; } .service-warning a.label:hover { color: white; } .service-warning .closing { } à&Ë t½à¤¹›¤°3 ; ------MultipartBoundary--k7z3wgbwMgdVzG0MqRUwwpj3MVpc76LQZ2bn24S81y---- Content-Type: text/css Content-Transfer-Encoding: binary Content-Location: https://my.nu.edu.kz/my-main-web/css/bootstrap/bootstrap.css @charset "utf-8"; html, body, div, dl, dt, dd, ul, ol, li, h1, h2, h3, h4, h5, h6, pre, code, form, fieldset, legend, input, textarea, p, blockquote, th, td { margin: 0px; padding: 0px; } table { border-collapse: collapse; border-spacing: 0px; } fieldset, img { border: 0px; } address, caption, cite, code, dfn, em, strong, th, var { font-style: normal; font-weight: normal; } li { list-style: none; } caption, th { text-align: left; } h1, h2, h3, h4, h5, h6 { font-size: 100%; } q::before, q::after { content: ""; } abbr, acronym { border: 0px; font-variant: normal; } sup { vertical-align: text-top; } sub { vertical-align: text-bottom; } input, textarea, select { font-family: inherit; font-size: inherit; font-weight: inherit; } :focus { outline: none; } .x-border-box, .x-border-box * { box-sizing: border-box; } .x-body { margin: 0px; font-family: "Helvetica Neue", Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 20px; color: rgb(51, 51, 51); background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); } .x-rtl { direction: rtl; } .x-ltr { direction: ltr; } .x-clear { overflow: hidden; clear: both; font-size: 0px; line-height: 0; display: table; } .x-strict .x-ie7 .x-clear { height: 0px; width: 0px; } .x-layer { overflow: hidden; zoom: 1; position: absolute !important; } .x-shim { position: absolute; left: 0px; top: 0px; overflow: hidden; opacity: 0; } .x-hide-display { display: none !important; } .x-hide-visibility { visibility: hidden !important; } .x-item-disabled .x-form-item-label, .x-item-disabled .x-form-field, .x-item-disabled .x-form-cb-label, .x-item-disabled .x-form-trigger { cursor: not-allowed; background-color: rgb(238, 238, 238); } .x-ie6 .x-item-disabled { filter: none; } .x-hidden, .x-hide-offsets { display: block !important; visibility: hidden !important; position: absolute !important; left: -10000px !important; top: -10000px !important; } .x-hide-nosize { height: 0px !important; width: 0px !important; } .x-masked-relative { position: relative; } .x-ie6 .x-masked select, .x-ie6.x-body-masked select { visibility: hidden !important; } .x-css-shadow { position: absolute; border-radius: 6px; } .x-ie-shadow { background-color: rgb(119, 119, 119); display: none; position: absolute; overflow: hidden; zoom: 1; } .x-box-tl { background: 0px 0px no-repeat transparent; zoom: 1; } .x-box-tc { height: 8px; background: 0px 0px repeat-x transparent; overflow: hidden; } .x-box-tr { background: right -8px no-repeat transparent; } .x-box-ml { background: 0px center repeat-y transparent; padding-left: 4px; overflow: hidden; zoom: 1; } .x-box-mc { background: 0px -16px repeat-x; padding: 4px 10px; } .x-box-mc h3 { margin: 0px 0px 4px; zoom: 1; } .x-box-mr { background: right center repeat-y transparent; padding-right: 4px; overflow: hidden; } .x-box-bl { background: 0px -16px no-repeat transparent; zoom: 1; } .x-box-bc { background: 0px -8px repeat-x transparent; height: 8px; overflow: hidden; } .x-box-br { background: right -24px no-repeat transparent; } .x-box-tl, .x-box-bl { padding-left: 8px; overflow: hidden; } .x-box-tr, .x-box-br { padding-right: 8px; overflow: hidden; } .x-box-tl { background-image: url("../../theme/images/bootstrap/box/corners.gif"); } .x-box-tc { background-image: url("../../theme/images/bootstrap/box/tb.gif"); } .x-box-tr { background-image: url("../../theme/images/bootstrap/box/corners.gif"); } .x-box-ml { background-image: url("../../theme/images/bootstrap/box/l.gif"); } .x-box-mc { background-color: rgb(238, 238, 238); background-image: url("../../theme/images/bootstrap/box/tb.gif"); font-family: "Myriad Pro", "Myriad Web", Tahoma, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; color: rgb(57, 57, 57); font-size: 15px; } .x-box-mc h3 { font-size: 18px; font-weight: bold; } .x-box-mr { background-image: url("../../theme/images/bootstrap/box/r.gif"); } .x-box-bl { background-image: url("../../theme/images/bootstrap/box/corners.gif"); } .x-box-bc { background-image: url("../../theme/images/bootstrap/box/tb.gif"); } .x-box-br { background-image: url("../../theme/images/bootstrap/box/corners.gif"); } .x-box-blue .x-box-bl, .x-box-blue .x-box-br, .x-box-blue .x-box-tl, .x-box-blue .x-box-tr { background-image: url("../../theme/images/bootstrap/box/corners-blue.gif"); } .x-box-blue .x-box-bc, .x-box-blue .x-box-mc, .x-box-blue .x-box-tc { background-image: url("../../theme/images/bootstrap/box/tb-blue.gif"); } .x-box-blue .x-box-mc { background-color: rgb(195, 218, 249); } .x-box-blue .x-box-mc h3 { color: rgb(23, 56, 91); } .x-box-blue .x-box-ml { background-image: url("../../theme/images/bootstrap/box/l-blue.gif"); } .x-box-blue .x-box-mr { background-image: url("../../theme/images/bootstrap/box/r-blue.gif"); } .x-container { zoom: 1; } .x-container::before { content: ""; clear: both; display: table; } table.x-container::before, tbody.x-container::before, tr.x-container::before { display: none; } a { color: rgb(0, 136, 204); text-decoration: none; } a:hover { color: rgb(0, 85, 128); text-decoration: underline; } .img-rounded { border-radius: 6px; } .img-polaroid { padding: 4px; background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); border: 1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2); box-shadow: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1) 0px 1px 3px; } .img-circle { border-radius: 500px; } .x-focus-element { position: absolute; top: -10px; left: -10px; width: 0px; height: 0px; } .x-focus-frame { position: absolute; left: 0px; top: 0px; z-index: 100000000; width: 0px; height: 0px; } .x-focus-frame-top, .x-focus-frame-bottom, .x-focus-frame-left, .x-focus-frame-right { position: absolute; top: 0px; left: 0px; } .x-focus-frame-top, .x-focus-frame-bottom { border-top: 2px solid rgb(21, 66, 139); height: 2px; } .x-focus-frame-left, .x-focus-frame-right { border-left: 2px solid rgb(21, 66, 139); width: 2px; } .x-mask { z-index: 100; position: absolute; top: 0px; left: 0px; opacity: 0.5; width: 100%; height: 100%; zoom: 1; background: rgb(204, 204, 204); } .x-mask-msg { z-index: 20001; position: absolute; top: 0px; left: 0px; padding: 2px; border: 1px solid rgb(221, 221, 221); background: rgb(255, 255, 255); } .x-mask-msg div { padding: 5px 10px 5px 25px; background-image: url("../../theme/images/bootstrap/grid/loading.gif"); background-repeat: no-repeat; background-position: 5px center; cursor: wait; border: 1px solid rgb(213, 213, 213); background-color: rgb(238, 238, 238); color: rgb(34, 34, 34); font: 11px tahoma, arial, verdana, sans-serif; } @-webkit-keyframes progress-bar-stripes { 0% { background-position: 40px 0px; } 100% { background-position: 0px 0px; } } @keyframes progress-bar-stripes { 0% { background-position: 40px 0px; } 100% { background-position: 0px 0px; } } p { margin: 0px 0px 10px; } .lead { margin-bottom: 20px; font-size: 21px; font-weight: 200; line-height: 30px; } small { font-size: 85%; } strong { font-weight: bold; } em { font-style: italic; } cite { font-style: normal; } .muted { color: rgb(153, 153, 153); } .text-warning { color: rgb(192, 152, 83); } .text-error { color: rgb(185, 74, 72); } .text-info { color: rgb(58, 135, 173); } .text-success { color: rgb(70, 136, 71); } h1, h2, h3, h4, h5, h6 { margin: 10px 0px; font-family: inherit; font-weight: bold; line-height: 1; color: inherit; text-rendering: optimizelegibility; } h1 small, h2 small, h3 small, h4 small, h5 small, h6 small { font-weight: normal; line-height: 1; color: rgb(153, 153, 153); } h1 { font-size: 36px; line-height: 40px; } h2 { font-size: 30px; line-height: 40px; } h3 { font-size: 24px; line-height: 40px; } h4 { font-size: 18px; line-height: 20px; } h5 { font-size: 14px; line-height: 20px; } h6 { font-size: 12px; line-height: 20px; } h1 small { font-size: 24px; } h2 small { font-size: 18px; } h3 small { font-size: 14px; } h4 small { font-size: 14px; } .page-header { padding-bottom: 9px; margin: 20px 0px 30px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgb(238, 238, 238); } ul, ol { padding: 0px; margin: 0px 0px 10px; } ul ul, ul ol, ol ol, ol ul { margin-bottom: 0px; } ul.unstyled, ol.unstyled { margin-left: 0px; list-style: none; } dl { margin-bottom: 20px; } dt, dd { line-height: 20px; } dt { font-weight: bold; } dd { margin-left: 10px; } .dl-horizontal dt { float: left; width: 160px; clear: left; text-align: right; } .dl-horizontal dd { margin-left: 180px; } hr { margin: 20px 0px; border-width: 1px 0px; border-right-style: initial; border-left-style: initial; border-right-color: initial; border-left-color: initial; border-image: initial; border-top-style: solid; border-top-color: rgb(238, 238, 238); border-bottom-style: solid; border-bottom-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); } abbr[title] { cursor: help; border-bottom: 1px dotted rgb(153, 153, 153); } abbr.initialism { font-size: 90%; text-transform: uppercase; } blockquote { padding: 0px 0px 0px 15px; margin: 0px 0px 20px; border-left: 5px solid rgb(238, 238, 238); } blockquote p { margin-bottom: 0px; } blockquote small { display: block; line-height: 20px; color: rgb(153, 153, 153); } blockquote small::before { content: "â€”Â "; } blockquote.pull-right { float: right; padding-right: 15px; padding-left: 0px; border-right: 5px solid rgb(238, 238, 238); border-left: 0px; } blockquote.pull-right p, blockquote.pull-right small { text-align: right; } blockquote.pull-right small::before { content: ""; } blockquote.pull-right small::after { content: "Â â€”"; } q::before, q::after, blockquote::before, blockquote::after { content: ""; } address { display: block; margin-bottom: 20px; font-style: normal; line-height: 20px; } .label, .label-important, .label-important[href], .label-warning, .label-warning[href], .label-success, .label-success[href], .label-info, .label-info[href], .label-inverse, .label-inverse[href], .badge, .badge-important, .badge-important[href], .badge-warning, .badge-warning[href], .badge-success, .badge-success[href], .badge-info, .badge-info[href], .badge-inverse, .badge-inverse[href] { font-size: 11.844px; font-weight: bold; line-height: 14px; color: rgb(255, 255, 255); vertical-align: baseline; white-space: nowrap; text-shadow: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.25) 0px -1px 0px; background-color: rgb(153, 153, 153); } .label, .label-important, .label-important[href], .label-warning, .label-warning[href], .label-success, .label-success[href], .label-info, .label-info[href], .label-inverse, .label-inverse[href] { padding: 1px 4px 2px; border-radius: 3px; } .badge, .badge-important, .badge-important[href], .badge-warning, .badge-warning[href], .badge-success, .badge-success[href], .badge-info, .badge-info[href], .badge-inverse, .badge-inverse[href] { padding: 1px 9px 2px; border-radius: 9px; } a.label:hover, a.label-important:hover, a.label-warning:hover, a.label-success:hover, a.label-info:hover, a.label-inverse:hover, a.badge:hover, a.badge-important:hover, a.badge-warning:hover, a.badge-success:hover, a.badge-info:hover, a.badge-inverse:hover { color: rgb(255, 255, 255); text-decoration: none; cursor: pointer; } .label-important { background-color: rgb(185, 74, 72); } .label-important[href] { background-color: rgb(149, 59, 57); } .label-warning { background-color: rgb(248, 148, 6); } .label-warning[href] { background-color: rgb(198, 118, 5); } .label-success { background-color: rgb(70, 136, 71); } .label-success[href] { background-color: rgb(53, 102, 53); } .label-info { background-color: rgb(58, 135, 173); } .label-info[href] { background-color: rgb(45, 105, 135); } .label-inverse { background-color: rgb(51, 51, 51); } .label-inverse[href] { { position: relative; } .x-boundlist-item { padding: 2px; user-select: none; cursor: pointer; position: relative; border-width: 1px; border-style: solid; border-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); } .x-boundlist-selected { color: rgb(242, 242, 242); background: -webkit-linear-gradient(top, rgb(0, 119, 179), rgb(0, 102, 153)) rgb(0, 119, 179); border-color: rgb(0, 119, 179); } .x-boundlist-item-over { color: rgb(255, 255, 255); background: -webkit-linear-gradient(top, rgb(0, 136, 204), rgb(0, 119, 179)) rgb(0, 136, 204); border-color: rgb(0, 136, 204); } .x-boundlist-floating { border-top-width: 0px; } .x-boundlist-above { border-top-width: 1px; border-bottom-width: 1px; } .x-btn { display: inline-block; zoom: 1; position: relative; cursor: pointer; .x-btn em { background-repeat: no-repeat; } .x-btn em a { text-decoration: none; display: block; color: inherit; width: 100%; zoom: 1; } .x-btn button { width: 100%; display: block; margin: 0px; 11px tahoma, arial, verdana, sans-serif; color: rgb(140, 140, 140); } .x-datepicker { border: 1px solid rgb(95, 88, 87); background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); position: relative; } .x-datepicker a { outline: none 0px; color: rgb(122, 87, 85); text-decoration: none; border-width: 0px; } .x-datepicker-inner, .x-datepicker-inner td, .x-datepicker-inner th { border-collapse: separate; } .x-datepicker-header { position: relative; height: 26px; background-color: rgb(103, 103, 103); background-image: -webkit-linear-gradient(top, rgb(111, 110, 110), rgb(93, 92, 92)); } .x-datepicker-prev, .x-datepicker-next { position: absolute; top: 5px; width: 18px; } .x-datepicker-prev a, .x-datepicker-next a { display: block; width: 16px; height: 16px; background-position: center top; background-repeat: no-repeat; cursor: pointer; opacity: 0.7; text-decoration: none !important; } .x-datepicker-prev a:hover, .x-datepicker-next a:hover { opacity: 1; } .x-datepicker-next { right: 5px; } .x-datepicker-next a { background-image: url("../../theme/images/bootstrap/shared/right-btn.gif"); } .x-datepicker-prev { left: 5px; } .x-datepicker-prev a { background-image: url("../../theme/images/bootstrap/shared/left-btn.gif"); } .x-item-disabled .x-datepicker-prev a:hover, .x-item-disabled .x-datepicker-next a:hover { opacity: 0.6; } .x-datepicker-month { padding-top: 3px; } .x-datepicker-month .x-btn, .x-datepicker-month button, .x-datepicker-month .x-btn-tc, .x-datepicker-month .x-btn-tl, .x-datepicker-month .x-btn-tr, .x-datepicker-month .x-btn-mc, .x-datepicker-month .x-btn-ml, .x-datepicker-month .x-btn-mr, .x-datepicker-month .x-btn-bc, .x-datepicker-month .x-btn-bl, .x-datepicker-month .x-btn-br { background: transparent !important; border-width: 0px !important; } .x-datepicker-month span { color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; } .x-datepicker-month .x-btn-split-right { background-image: url("../../theme/images/bootstrap/button/s-arrow-light.gif"); padding-right: 12px; } .x-datepicker-next { text-align: right; } .x-datepicker-month { text-align: center; } .x-datepicker-month button { color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; } table.x-datepicker-inner { width: 100%; table-layout: fixed; } table.x-datepicker-inner th { width: 25px; height: 19px; padding: 0px; color: rgb(96, 96, 96); font: 10px tahoma, arial, verdana, sans-serif; text-align: right; border-bottom: 1px solid rgb(235, 224, 224); border-collapse: separate; background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); background-image: -webkit-linear-gradient(top, rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(247, 243, 243)); cursor: default; } table.x-datepicker-inner th span { display: block; padding-right: 7px; } table.x-datepicker-inner tr { height: 20px; } table.x-datepicker-inner td { border: 1px solid rgb(255, 255, 255); height: 17px; text-align: right; padding: 0px; } table.x-datepicker-inner a { padding-right: 4px; display: block; zoom: 1; font: 11px tahoma, arial, verdana, sans-serif; color: rgb(0, 0, 0); text-decoration: none; text-align: right; } table.x-datepicker-inner .x-datepicker-active { cursor: pointer; color: black; } table.x-datepicker-inner .x-datepicker-selected a { background: left top repeat-x rgb(254, 254, 254); border: 1px solid rgb(210, 205, 205); } table.x-datepicker-inner .x-datepicker-selected span { font-weight: bold; } table.x-datepicker-inner .x-datepicker-today a { border: 1px solid darkred; } table.x-datepicker-inner .x-datepicker-prevday a, table.x-datepicker-inner .x-datepicker-nextday a { color: rgb(170, 170, 170); text-decoration: none !important; } table.x-datepicker-inner a:hover, table.x-datepicker-inner .x-datepicker-disabled a:hover { color: rgb(0, 0, 0); background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); text-decoration: none !important; } table.x-datepicker-inner .x-datepicker-disabled a { cursor: default; background-color: rgb(238, 238, 238); color: rgb(187, 187, 187); } .x-datepicker-footer, .x-monthpicker-buttons { position: relative; border-top: 1px solid rgb(235, 224, 224); background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); background-image: -webkit-linear-gradient(top, rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(248, 248, 248) 49%, rgb(242, 242, 242) 51%, rgb(244, 244, 244)); text-align: center; } .x-datepicker-footer .x-btn, .x-monthpicker-buttons .x-btn { position: relative; margin: 4px; } .x-item-disabled .x-datepicker-inner a:hover { background: none; } .x-datepicker .x-monthpicker { position: absolute; left: 0px; top: 0px; } .x-monthpicker { border: 1px solid rgb(95, 88, 87); background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); } .x-monthpicker-months, .x-monthpicker-years { float: left; height: 167px; width: 88px; } .x-monthpicker-item { float: left; margin: 4px 0px 5px; font: 11px tahoma, arial, verdana, sans-serif; text-align: center; vertical-align: middle; height: 18px; width: 43px; border: 0px none; } .x-monthpicker-item a { display: block; margin: 0px 5px; text-decoration: none; color: rgb(122, 87, 85); border: 1px solid rgb(255, 255, 255); line-height: 17px; } .x-monthpicker-item a:hover { background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); } .x-monthpicker-item a.x-monthpicker-selected { background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); border: 1px solid rgb(210, 205, 205); } .x-monthpicker-months { border-right: 1px solid rgb(95, 88, 87); width: 87px; } .x-monthpicker-years .x-monthpicker-item { width: 44px; } .x-monthpicker-yearnav { height: 28px; } .x-monthpicker-yearnav button { background-image: url("../../theme/images/bootstrap/tools/tool-sprites.gif"); height: 15px; width: 15px; padding: 0px; margin: 6px 12px 5px 15px; border: 0px; outline: none 0px; } .x-monthpicker-yearnav-next { background-position: 0px -120px; } .x-monthpicker-yearnav-next-over { cursor: pointer; background-position: -15px -120px; } .x-monthpicker-yearnav-prev { background-position: 0px -105px; } .x-monthpicker-yearnav-prev-over { cursor: pointer; background-position: -15px -105px; } .x-monthpicker-small .x-monthpicker-item { margin: 2px 0px; } .x-monthpicker-small .x-monthpicker-yearnav { height: 23px; } .x-monthpicker-small .x-monthpicker-months, .x-monthpicker-small .x-monthpicker-years { height: 136px; } .x-quirks .x-ie7 .x-monthpicker-buttons .x-btn, .x-quirks .x-ie8 .x-monthpicker-buttons .x-btn { margin-top: 2px; } .x-quirks .x-monthpicker-small .x-monthpicker-yearnav button { margin-top: 3px; margin-bottom: 3px; } .x-ie6 .x-monthpicker-small .x-monthpicker-yearnav button { margin-top: 3px; margin-bottom: 3px; } .x-nlg .x-datepicker-header { background-image: url("../../theme/images/bootstrap/datepicker/datepicker-header-bg.gif"); background-repeat: repeat-x; background-position: left top; } .x-nlg .x-datepicker-footer, .x-nlg .x-monthpicker-buttons { background-image: url("../../theme/images/bootstrap/datepicker/datepicker-footer-bg.gif"); background-repeat: repeat-x; background-position: left top; } .x-color-picker { width: 144px; height: 90px; cursor: pointer; } .x-color-picker a { border: 1px solid rgb(255, 255, 255); float: left; padding: 2px; text-decoration: none; outline: none 0px; cursor: pointer; } .x-color-picker a:hover, .x-color-picker a.x-color-picker-selected { border-color: rgb(139, 184, 243); background-color: rgb(222, 236, 253); } .x-color-picker em { display: block; border: 1px solid rgb(172, 168, 153); } .x-color-picker em span { cursor: pointer; display: block; height: 10px; width: 10px; line-height: 10px; } .x-menu-body { user-select: none; cursor: default; padding: 2px; background: rgb(240, 240, 240) !important; } .x-menu-item .x-form-text { user-select: text; } .x-menu-icon-separator { position: absolute; top: 0px; left: 27px; z-index: 0; border-left: 1px solid rgb(224, 224, 224); background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); width: 2px; overflow: hidden; } .x-menu-plain .x-menu-icon-separator { display: none; } .x-menu-focus { display: block; position: absolute; top: -10px; left: -10px; width: 0px; height: 0px; } .x-menu-item { white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; z-index: 1; } .x-menu-item-cmp { margin-bottom: 1px; } .x-menu-item-link { display: block; margin: 1px; padding: 6px 2px 3px 32px; line-height: 16px; cursor: default; text-decoration: none !important; } .x-opera .x-menu-item-link { position: relative; } .x-menu-item-icon { width: 16px; height: 16px; position: absolute; top: 5px; left: 4px; background: center center no-repeat; } .x-menu-item-icon-right { width: 16px; height: 16px; position: absolute; top: 6px; right: 4px; background: center center no-repeat; } .x-menu-item-text { font-size: 11px; color: rgb(34, 34, 34); } .x-menu-item-checked .x-menu-item-icon { background-image: url("../../theme/images/bootstrap/menu/checked.gif"); } .x-menu-item-checked .x-menu-group-icon { background-image: url("../../theme/images/bootstrap/menu/group-checked.gif"); } .x-menu-item-unchecked .x-menu-item-icon { background-image: url("../../theme/images/bootstrap/menu/unchecked.gif"); } .x-menu-item-unchecked .x-menu-group-icon { background-image: none; } .x-menu-item-separator { height: 2px; border-top: 1px solid rgb(224, 224, 224); background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); margin: 2px 0px; overflow: hidden; } .x-menu-item-arrow { position: absolute; width: 12px; height: 9px; top: 9px; right: 0px; background: url("../../theme/images/bootstrap/menu/menu-parent.gif") center center no-repeat; } .x-menu-item-indent { margin-left: 31px; } .x-menu-item-active { cursor: pointer; } .x-menu-item-active .x-menu-item-link { background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); background-image: .x-ie .x-menu-item-disabled .x-menu-item-icon { opacity: 0.5; } .x-ie .x-menu-item-disabled .x-menu-item-text { background-color: transparent; } .x-strict .x-ie7m .x-ie .x-menu-icon-separator { width: 187, 232); } .x-panel .x-grid-body { background: rgb(255, 255, 255); border-color: rgb(197, 197, 197) rgb(221, 221, 221) rgb(221, 221, 221); border-style: solid; border-width: 1px; } .x-panel table-layout: auto; width: auto !important; } .x-grid-row .x-grid-table { border-collapse: collapse; } .x-grid-locked .x-grid-inner-locked { border-style: solid; border-width: 0px 1px 0px 0px initial; background-color: rgb(197, 197, 197); background-image: -webkit-linear-gradient(top, rgb(249, 249, 249), rgb(227, 228, 230)); } .x-accordion-item .x-grid-header-ct { border-width: 0px 0px 1px !important; } .x-column-header { padding: 0px; position: absolute; overflow: hidden; border-width: 0px 1px 0px 0px; border-style: none solid none none; border-right-color: rgb(197, 197, 197); border-left-color: initial; border-top-color: initial; border-bottom-color: initial; text-shadow: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3) 0px 1px 0px; font: 11px tahoma, arial, verdana, sans-serif; background-color: rgb(197, 197, 197); background-image: -webkit-linear-gradient(top, rgb(249, 249, 249), rgb(227, 228, 230)); } .x-group-header { padding: 0px; border-left-width: 0px; } .x-group-sub-header { .x-tip-header-draggable .x-tip-header-text { cursor: move; } .x-tip-body, .x-form-invalid-tip-body { overflow: hidden; position: relative; padding: 3px; } .x-tip-header, .x-tip-body, .x-form-invalid-tip-body { color: rgb(68, 68, 68); font-size: 11px; font-weight: normal; } .x-tip-header a, .x-tip-body a, .x-form-invalid-tip-body a { color: rgb(42, 42, 42); } .x-tip-anchor { position: absolute; overflow: hidden; height: 0px; width: 0px; border-style: solid; border-width: 5px; border-color: rgb(185, 185, 185); zoom: 1; } .x-border-box .x-tip-anchor { width: 10px; height: 10px; } .x-tip-anchor-top { border-top-color: transparent; border-left-color: transparent; border-right-color: transparent; } .x-tip-anchor-bottom { border-bottom-color: transparent; 1; } .x-slider-inner { position: relative; left: 0px; top: 0px; overflow: visible; zoom: 1; } .x-slider-focus { position: absolute; left: 0px; top: 0px; width: 1px; height: 1px; line-height: 1px; font-size: 1px; outline: none 0px; user-select: none; cursor: default; display: block; overflow: hidden; } .x-slider-horz { padding-left: 7px; background: 0px -24px no-repeat transparent; width: 100%; } .x-slider-horz .x-slider-end { padding-right: 7px; zoom: 1; background: right -46px no-repeat transparent; } .x-slider-horz .x-slider-inner { background: 0px -2px repeat-x transparent; height: 18px; } .x-slider-horz .x-slider-thumb { width: 14px; height: 15px; margin-left: -7px; position: absolute; left: 0px; top: 1px; background: 0px 0px no-repeat transparent; } .x-slider-horz .x-slider-thumb-over { background-position: -14px -15px; } .x-slider-horz .x-slider-thumb-drag { background-position: -28px -30px; } .x-slider-vert { padding-top: 7px; background: -44px 0px no-repeat transparent; } .x-slider-vert .x-slider-end { padding-bottom: 7px; zoom: 1; background: -22px bottom no-repeat transparent; width: 22px; } .x-slider-vert .x-slider-inner { background: 0px 0px repeat-y transparent; width: 22px; } .x-slider-vert .x-slider-thumb { width: 15px; height: 14px; margin-bottom: -7px; position: absolute; left: 3px; bottom: 0px; background: 0px 0px no-repeat transparent; } .x-slider-vert .x-slider-thumb-over { background-position: -15px -14px; } .x-slider-vert .x-slider-thumb-drag { background-position: -30px -28px; } .x-slider-horz, .x-slider-horz .x-slider-end, .x-slider-horz .x-slider-inner { background-image: url("../../theme/images/bootstrap/slider/slider-bg.png"); } .x-slider-horz .x-slider-thumb { background-image: h2, .x-html h3, .x-html h4, .x-html h5, .x-html h6, .x-html b, .x-html strong { font-weight: bolder; } .x-html blockquote { margin-left: 40px; margin-right: 40px; } .x-html i, .x-html cite, .x-html em, .x-html var, .x-html address { font-style: italic; } .x-html pre, .x-html tt, .x-html code, .x-html kbd, .x-html samp { font-family: monospace; } .x-html pre { white-space: pre; } .x-html button, .x-html textarea, .x-html input, .x-html select { display: inline-block; } .x-html big { font-size: 1.17em; } .x-html small, .x-html sub, .x-html sup { font-size: 0.83em; } .x-html sub { vertical-align: sub; } .x-html sup { vertical-align: super; } .x-html table { border-spacing: 2px; } .x-html thead, .x-html tbody, .x-html tfoot { vertical-align: middle; } .x-html td, .x-html th { vertical-align: inherit; } .x-html s, .x-html strike, .x-html del { text-decoration: line-through; } .x-html hr { border: 1px inset; } .x-html ol, .x-html ul, .x-html dir, .x-html menu, .x-html dd { margin-left: 40px; } .x-html ul, .x-html menu, .x-html dir { list-style-type: disc; } .x-html ol { list-style-type: decimal; } .x-html ol ul, .x-html ul ol, .x-html ul ul, .x-html ol ol { margin-top: 0px; margin-bottom: 0px; } .x-html u, .x-html ins { text-decoration: underline; } .x-html br::before { content: "\a "; } .x-html ::before, .x-html ::after { white-space: pre-line; } .x-html center { text-align: center; } .x-html :link, .x-html :visited { text-decoration: underline; } .x-html :focus { } .x-html bdo[dir="ltr"] { direction: ltr; unicode-bidi: bidi-override; } .x-html bdo[dir="rtl"] { direction: rtl; unicode-bidi: bidi-override; } ------MultipartBoundary--k7z3wgbwMgdVzG0MqRUwwpj3MVpc76LQZ2bn24S81y---- Content-Type: text/css Content-Transfer-Encoding: binary Content-Location: https://my.nu.edu.kz/.UserProfile/css/style.css @charset "utf-8"; .my_profile { width: 228px; color: rgb(255, 255, 255); line-height: normal; text-shadow: none; } .my_profile .profile_photo img { max-height: 208px; max-width: 203px; margin: 0px auto; display: block; } .my_profile .profile_id { margin-top: 5px; margin-bottom: 15px; font-size: 13px; color: rgb(0, 57, 173); text-transform: uppercase; font-weight: 900; } .my_profile .person-name { color: rgb(202, 135, 40); font-weight: 900; text-shadow: none; text-transform: uppercase; margin: 0px; } .my_profile .modalDialog { position: fixed; font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; inset: 0px; background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.8); z-index: 99999; transition: opacity 400ms ease-in; display: none; } .my_profile .modalDialog > div { width: 90%; height: 475px; position: relative; margin: 10% auto; padding: 5px 5px 60px; border-radius: 4px; background: rgb(255, 255, 255); } .my_profile .modalDialog embed { border: 1px solid rgb(204, 204, 204); height: 480px; width: 100%; } .my_profile .linkP { color: rgb(0, 136, 204); text-decoration: none; cursor: pointer; } .my_profile .linkP:hover { color: rgb(0, 85, 128); text-decoration: underline; } .my_profile .modalDialog .linkP { float: right; } ------MultipartBoundary--k7z3wgbwMgdVzG0MqRUwwpj3MVpc76LQZ2bn24S81y---- Content-Type: image/svg+xml .trcList a.lotusClose { color: rgb(196, 216, 242); } .trcList a.lotusClose:hover { color: rgb(153, 153, 153); } .trcList ul { padding: 0pt; margin: 0pt; display: inline; list-style-type: none; white-space: nowrap; } .trcList li { display: inline; white-space: nowrap; list-style-type: none; } .trcText { margin: 0px; padding: 2px; width: 97%; white-space: nowrap; font-weight: bold !important; } .trcBorder { border-color: rgb(196, 216, 242); border-width: 1px; border-style: solid; padding: 1px 3px !important; } .trcLine { line-height: 1px; width: 100%; background-color: rgb(128, 128, 128); .dialog_leftsidebar_notitle { min-height: 30px; position: absolute; left: 1px; width: 25px; top: 14px; bottom: 14px; background-color: black; opacity: 0.4; cursor: move; z-index: -1; padding-bottom: .dialog_rightsidebar_notitle { background: none; } .dialog_endbar { height: 0px; cursor: move; text-align: right; padding-right: 13px; font-size: 1.4em; background: black; opacity: 0.4; } .mumRoundCorner .dialog_endbar { border-radius: 0px 0px 20px 20px; } * html .dialog_endbar { background-color: rgb(34, 51, 77); display: none; } .dialog_titlebar { cursor: move; background-image: url("images/oneui/titleBkgd.png"); background-color: white; background-position: 0px -900px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgb(226, 235, 241); color: rgb(68, 68, 68); font-weight: bold; font-family: Arial, 1.2em; cursor: move; height: 13px; padding: 8px; background-image: url("images/blackAlpha40.png"); background-repeat: repeat; } .mumRoundCorner .dialog_titlebar_notitle { border-radius: 11px 11px 0px 0px; } * html .dialog_titlebar_notitle { background: transparent; } a.dialog_titlebar_close_wrapper, a.dialog_titlebar_close_wrapper:visited { float: right; border: 1px solid rgb(47, 118, 185); text-decoration: none; line-height: 0.8em; font-size: 0.7em !important; } a.dialog_titlebar_close_wrapper:hover { border-color: rgb(16, 57, 95); } .dialog_titlebar_close { cursor: pointer; height: 16px; width: 16px; background: url("images/oneui/iconClose16.png") left top no-repeat; color: rgb(16, 92, 182); font-weight: bold; border: 0px none; vertical-align: top; } .dijit_a11y .dialog_titlebar_close { width: 0px; height: 0px; } .customDialogDiv .lotusAltText { color: rgb(255, 255, 255); display: none; } .dijit_a11y .customDialogDiv .lotusAltText { display: inline; } ŒÉfà¯{  ÊÔŒð–þÓ—  @œý¿ ð# V œý—· Ðr (H¼ö[ø•áF·K#ÿ¬ËjØ'j÷ @Y†¾ùïÒÿÏ‹ct9ñ} Q3ð÷}1äÉŽUcÈ  ¿ ø]wí™­åÿÝW†¾ ð›QG €rÔ~—âŸö˜Õ† Ê1äußî¤ÇÌ=  P‚^³6êi™! @†œìÃõÿ!™8fwÝ'@ €\‚,ÆN/  (@3àw9ûÏcìÜ€ têOC`ì@ g±; @ÃØ CÑù û€! @îøÆ> ` @  @  @  @  @  @  @  @  @                   @  @  @  @  @  @  @  @                   @  @  @  @  @  @  @  @  @ À €  €  €  €  €  €  €  €  €       Ðµ_ A§~ßn·aH^mx¸O´ÇîÒ0$ïWC ¤ja ÛPøÙ0P— @  @  @  @  @  @  @ xÖµÍÌˆ6†ÀØ¡v ãøÓ~ÌXf³™"fìP;€‘¬íÇØ÷Œ!Ø÷ íYDXÆq&Á¾cH–6±v ð/û3»k?ç†áÕÎãX‚š! ìåÔ$ÂÀþÙžAØç^)Žá?‡÷S`Z“È'û5Ù”2 à7†|*%¼Ó Ý —•%Y†9{øèì¿ó ÿ±²ŠGÿÎc­(ãØ*mën·Û³öÇÂ~NOÅÿ} 7tìÎÛ«ös`4è©øµR\\'À¸-ÏÒµâßû±Æö}år Ý;-­ø âDrl"¡ËÉ£ý¼Sü ï„x:îÇEO¥oýív{Øþø½ý4•¥Ev QxFý\ÇºÑŽÝºº¿œ÷¡ýÌ; —êÖíç_%]ï žŸPæB »7ù%wììRü­Ô Àhþ_€ %*°¤íºPÔ IEND®B`‚ ------MultipartBoundary--k7z3wgbwMgdVzG0MqRUwwpj3MVpc76LQZ2bn24S81y---- Content-Type: image/png Content-Transfer-Encoding: binary Content-Location: https://my.nu.edu.kz/wps/mycontenthandler/!ut/p/digest!LEe0V04GRjuKnXEVveIM-w/dav/themelist/student.theme.adaptive-test-version-v/css/img/disable.png ‰PNG  IHDR   (-S `PLTEGpL2“¡2“¡2“¡2“¡2“¡2“¡2“¡2“¡2“¡2“¡2“¡2“¡2“¡2“¡2“¡2“¡2“¡2“¡2“¡2“¡2“¡2“¡2“¡2“¡2“¡2“¡2“¡2“¡2“¡2“¡2“¡–TÒ tRNS õ5Cì9ûn?ÓcZL¥²&ÛS™Hæ~ã/#àçÎq  ™IDATÁ‚CP ÀQ?Â"ÒÛ»ÿ-wðÚ¶ h’€iüLÉô'àè³ÔI½¤? ~¦—¤¼ûõî˜ƒ$”íÓ‚ý’Á×< hÀŒÎXÿ ÿÃÀMf3I4àÆ¦1Gu„?Ï¨L{)wgP ¸WÍo#ÕY KR2p»œ÷£?±wÏçLÃááÖÚp Ð1/ p¯Ýòîà-ò(x²'æí ŽU’ÒÕö_‡LÓ,û˜Ó5>õ&*â›ÝS[ºŸã}BUæâôovO˜–^‡¼ îüf÷d8·)%ÌþŒ¶+>½P –().9 ?hPóÌÏ*Í IEND®B`‚ ------MultipartBoundary--k7z3wgbwMgdVzG0MqRUwwpj3MVpc76LQZ2bn24S81y---- Content-Type: text/css Content-Transfer-Encoding: binary Content-Location: https://my.nu.edu.kz/wps/contenthandler/dav/themelist/student.theme.adaptive-test-version-v/css/bundle.min.css @charset "utf-8"; .left-menu-portlet li { text-align: left !important; } .about { padding: 40px; background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); } .about__content { display: flex; padding-top: 20px; } .about__text { width: 50%; opacity: 0.7; font-size: 14px; border-right: 3px dotted rgb(217, 217, 217); } .about__title { font-size: 30px; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 15px; } .about__imgs { display: flex; justify-content: space-around; width: 50%; } .about__profile { display: flex; -webkit-box-orient: vertical; -webkit-box-direction: normal; flex-direction: column; -webkit-box-align: center; align-items: center; } .about__profile .profile__img { margin-bottom: 5px; } .about__profile .profile__name { font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 5px; } .about__profile .profile__job { opacity: 0.6; margin-bottom: 5px; } .about__profile .profile__icon { opacity: 0.6; margin-right: 10px; cursor: pointer; } .about__profile .profile__icon:hover { color: rgb(15, 175, 241); } .auth { display: flex; -webkit-box-align: center; align-items: center; justify-content: space-around; -webkit-box-flex: 0; flex: 0 0 70px; } .auth__link { text-transform: uppercase; color: rgb(255, 255, 255); font-weight: 700; } .buy { background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); } .buy__content { display: flex; -webkit-box-orient: vertical; -webkit-box-direction: normal; flex-direction: column; -webkit-box-align: center; align-items: center; padding: 60px; } .buy__title { font-weight: 700; font-size: 25px; margin-bottom: 25px; opacity: 0.8; } .buy__subtitle { opacity: 0.6; margin-bottom: 50px; font-weight: 400; } .buy__input-wrapper { display: flex; width: 1000px; margin: 0px auto 50px; padding: 5px; border: 1px solid rgb(217, 217, 217); } .buy__www { -webkit-box-pack: center; justify-content: center; } .buy__help { display: flex; -webkit-box-align: center; align-items: center; width: 10%; color: rgb(217, 217, 217); } .buy__input-block { display: flex; -webkit-box-align: center; align-items: center; -webkit-box-pack: justify; justify-content: space-between; width: 80%; border-right: 1px solid rgb(217, 217, 217); border-left: 1px solid rgb(217, 217, 217); } .buy__input { width: 100%; border: none; outline: 0px; padding: 10px; } .buy__domain { margin-right: 50px; color: rgb(217, 217, 217); } .buy__select { position: relative; -webkit-box-pack: end; justify-content: flex-end; cursor: pointer; } .buy__select:hover .select__dropdown { opacity: 1; z-index: 99; } .buy__select .select__dropdown { padding: 0px; margin: 0px; list-style: none; position: absolute; width: 200px; height: 100px; right: -6px; top: 40px; opacity: 0; z-index: -100; border-top: 1px solid rgb(217, 217, 217); border-right: 1px solid rgb(217, 217, 217); border-left: 1px solid rgb(217, 217, 217); border-image: initial; border-bottom: none; background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); transition: 0.5s; } .buy__select .select__item { text-transform: uppercase; padding: 3px 15px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgb(217, 217, 217); } .buy__icon { margin-right: 20px; } .buy__table { width: 800px; } .buy__table .table__row { display: flex; } .buy__table .table__cell { position: relative; padding: 30px 50px; width: 25%; font-size: 13px; color: rgb(217, 217, 217); } .buy__table .table__cell::after { position: absolute; display: block; content: " "; height: 10px; width: 10px; right: -5px; bottom: -5px; z-index: 99; background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); } .buy__table .table__cell--top { border-bottom: 1px solid rgb(217, 217, 217); border-right: 1px solid rgb(217, 217, 217); } .buy__table .table__cell--bottom { border-right: 1px solid rgb(217, 217, 217); } .buy__table .table__cell--nrb { border-right: none; } .feature { background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); } .feature__content { display: flex; padding: 60px; } .feature__tile { display: flex; -webkit-box-align: center; align-items: center; -webkit-box-pack: center; justify-content: center; } .feature__tile .tile__icon { margin-bottom: 20px; height: 50px; width: 50px; font-size: 20px; border-radius: 50%; color: rgb(255, 255, 255); } .feature__tile .tile__icon--yellow { background-color: rgb(249, 212, 35); } .feature__tile .tile__icon--blue { background-color: rgb(15, 175, 241); } .feature__tile .tile__icon--grey { background-color: rgb(127, 140, 141); } .feature__tile .tile__icon--orange { background-color: rgb(241, 84, 15); } .feature__tile .tile__title { font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 10px; } .feature__tile .tile__text { text-align: center; opacity: 0.7; } @font-face { font-family: FontAwesome; src: url("../fonts/fontawesome-webfont.woff2?v=4.7.0") format("woff2"), url("../fonts/fontawesome-webfont.woff?v=4.7.0") format("woff"), url("../fonts/fontawesome-webfont.ttf?v=4.7.0") format("truetype"); font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; } .fa { display: inline-block; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; font-size-adjust: none; font-language-override: normal; font-kerning: auto; font-optical-sizing: auto; font-feature-settings: normal; font-variation-settings: normal; font-weight: normal; font-stretch: normal; line-height: 1; font-family: FontAwesome; font-size: inherit; text-rendering: auto; -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased; } .fa-lg { font-size: 1.33333em; line-height: 0.75em; vertical-align: -15%; } .fa-2x { font-size: 2em; } .fa-3x { font-size: 3em; } .fa-4x { font-size: 4em; } .fa-5x { font-size: 5em; } .fa-fw { width: 1.28571em; text-align: center; } .fa-ul { padding-left: 0px; margin-left: 2.14286em; list-style-type: none; } .fa-ul > li { position: relative; } .fa-li { position: absolute; left: -2.14286em; width: 2.14286em; top: 0.14286em; text-align: center; } .fa-li.fa-lg { left: -1.85714em; } .fa-border { padding: 0.2em 0.25em 0.15em; border: 0.08em solid rgb(238, 238, 238); border-radius: 0.1em; } .fa-pull-left { float: left; } .fa-pull-right { float: right; } .fa.fa-pull-left { margin-right: 0.3em; } .fa.fa-pull-right { margin-left: 0.3em; } .pull-right { float: right; } .pull-left { float: left; } .fa.pull-left { margin-right: 0.3em; } .fa.pull-right { margin-left: 0.3em; } .fa-spin { animation: 2s linear 0s infinite normal none running fa-spin; } .fa-pulse { animation: 1s steps(8) 0s infinite normal none running fa-spin; } @-webkit-keyframes fa-spin { 0% { transform: rotate(0deg); } 100% { transform: rotate(359deg); } } @keyframes fa-spin { 0% { transform: rotate(0deg); } 100% { transform: rotate(359deg); } } .fa-rotate-90 { transform: rotate(90deg); } .fa-rotate-180 { transform: rotate(180deg); } .fa-rotate-270 { transform: rotate(270deg); } .fa-flip-horizontal { transform: scale(-1, 1); } .fa-flip-vertical { transform: scale(1, -1); } :root .fa-flip-horizontal, :root .fa-flip-vertical, :root .fa-rotate-180, :root .fa-rotate-270, :root .fa-rotate-90 { filter: none; } .fa-stack { position: relative; display: inline-block; width: 2em; height: 2em; line-height: 2em; vertical-align: middle; } .fa-stack-1x, .fa-stack-2x { position: absolute; left: 0px; width: 100%; text-align: center; } .fa-stack-1x { line-height: inherit; } .fa-stack-2x { font-size: 2em; } .fa-inverse { color: rgb(255, 255, 255); } .fa-glass::before { content: "ï€€"; } .fa-music::before { content: "ï€"; } .fa-search::before { content: "ï€‚"; } .fa-envelope-o::before { content: "ï€ƒ"; } .fa-heart::before { content: "ï€„"; } .fa-star::before { content: "ï€…"; } .fa-star-o::before { content: "ï€†"; } .fa-user::before { content: "ï€‡"; } .fa-film::before { content: "ï€ˆ"; } .fa-th-large::before { content: "ï€‰"; } .fa-th::before { content: "ï€Š"; } .fa-th-list::before { content: "ï€‹"; } .fa-check::before { content: "ï€Œ"; } .fa-close::before, .fa-remove::before, .fa-times::before { content: "ï€"; } .fa-search-plus::before { content: "ï€Ž"; } .fa-search-minus::before { content: "ï€"; } .fa-power-off::before { content: "ï€‘"; } .fa-signal::before { content: "ï€’"; } .fa-cog::before, .fa-gear::before { content: "ï€“"; } .fa-trash-o::before { content: "ï€”"; } .fa-home::before { content: "ï€•"; } .fa-file-o::before { content: "ï€–"; } .fa-clock-o::before { content: "ï€—"; } .fa-road::before { content: "ï€˜"; } .fa-download::before { content: "ï€™"; } .fa-arrow-circle-o-down::before { content: "ï€š"; } .fa-arrow-circle-o-up::before { content: "ï€›"; } .fa-inbox::before { content: "ï€œ"; } .fa-play-circle-o::before { content: "ï€"; } .fa-repeat::before, .fa-rotate-right::before { content: "ï€ž"; } .fa-refresh::before { content: "ï€¡"; } .fa-list-alt::before { content: "ï€¢"; } .fa-lock::before { content: "ï€£"; } .fa-flag::before { content: "ï€¤"; } .fa-headphones::before { content: "ï€¥"; } .fa-volume-off::before { content: "ï€¦"; } .fa-volume-down::before { content: "ï€§"; } .fa-volume-up::before { content: "ï€¨"; } .fa-qrcode::before { content: "ï€©"; } .fa-barcode::before { content: "ï€ª"; } .fa-tag::before { content: "ï€«"; } .fa-tags::before { content: "ï€¬"; } .fa-book::before { content: "ï€­"; } .fa-bookmark::before { content: "ï€®"; } .fa-print::before { content: "ï€¯"; } .fa-camera::before { content: "ï€°"; } .fa-font::before { content: "ï€±"; } .fa-bold::before { content: "ï€²"; } .fa-italic::before { content: "ï€³"; } .fa-text-height::before { content: "ï€´"; } .fa-text-width::before { content: "ï€µ"; } .fa-align-left::before { content: "ï€¶"; } .fa-align-center::before { content: "ï€·"; } .fa-align-right::before { content: "ï€¸"; } .fa-align-justify::before { content: "ï€¹"; } .fa-list::before { content: "ï€º"; } .fa-dedent::before, .fa-outdent::before { content: "ï€»"; } .fa-indent::before { content: "ï€¼"; } .fa-video-camera::before { content: "ï€½"; } .fa-image::before, .fa-photo::before, .fa-picture-o::before { content: "ï€¾"; } .fa-pencil::before { content: "ï€"; } .fa-map-marker::before { content: "ï"; } .fa-adjust::before { content: "ï‚"; } .fa-tint::before { content: "ïƒ"; } .fa-edit::before, .fa-pencil-square-o::before { content: "ï„"; } .fa-share-square-o::before { content: "ï…"; } .fa-check-square-o::before { content: "ï†"; } .fa-arrows::before { content: "ï‡"; } .fa-step-backward::before { content: "ïˆ"; } .fa-fast-backward::before { content: "ï‰"; } .fa-backward::before { content: "ïŠ"; } .fa-play::before { content: "ï‹"; } .fa-pause::before { content: "ïŒ"; } .fa-stop::before { content: "ï"; } .fa-forward::before { content: "ïŽ"; } .fa-fast-forward::before { content: "ï"; } .fa-step-forward::before { content: "ï‘"; } .fa-eject::before { content: "ï’"; } .fa-chevron-left::before { content: "ï“"; } .fa-chevron-right::before { content: "ï”"; } .fa-plus-circle::before { content: "ï•"; } .fa-minus-circle::before { content: "ï–"; } .fa-arrow-up::before { content: "ï¢"; } .fa-arrow-down::before { content: "ï£"; } .fa-mail-forward::before, .fa-share::before { content: "ï¤"; } .fa-expand::before { content: "ï¥"; } .fa-compress::before { content: "ï¦"; } .fa-plus::before { content: "ï§"; } .fa-minus::before { content: "ï¨"; } .fa-asterisk::before { content: "ï©"; } .fa-exclamation-circle::before { content: "ïª"; } .fa-gift::before { content: "ï«"; border: 0px; } .sr-only-focusable:active, .sr-only-focusable:focus { position: static; width: auto; height: auto; margin: 0px; overflow: visible; clip: auto; } .footer { color: rgb(66, 66, 66); font-size: 14px; display: flex; -webkit-box-orient: vertical; -webkit-box-direction: normal; flex-direction: column; padding-top: 100px; } .footer__collapse { background-color: rgb(221, 222, 224); } .footer__collapse #collapse-footermenu { display: none; } .footer__collapse button { border: none; text-align: left; cursor: pointer; appearance: button !important; background: rgb(221, 222, 224) !important; color: rgb(81, 78, 70) !important; font-weight: 700 !important; font-size: 16px !important; } .footer__collapse button.btn { padding: 0.375rem 0.75rem; } .footer__collapse button.btn-block { display: block; width: 100%; } .footer__collapse button i { float: right; line-height: inherit; } .footer__collapse button[aria-expanded="false"] .fa-chevron-up, .footer__collapse button[aria-expanded="true"] .fa-chevron-down { display: none; } .footer__collapse .collapse.show { max-height: 99em; transition: max-height 0.5s ease-in-out; } .footer__collapse .collapse.show:not(.show) { display: none !important; } .footer a { color: rgb(66, 66, 66); } .footer__header { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; margin-left: -15px; margin-right: -15px; -webkit-box-pack: justify; justify-content: space-between; padding: 30px 0px 0px; } .footer__footer { background: rgb(130, 89, 61); padding: 20px 0px; } .footer__info { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; margin-left: -15px; margin-right: -15px; -webkit-box-pack: justify; justify-content: space-between; } .footer__contact { width: calc(20.8333% - 30px); text-align: left; -webkit-box-ordinal-group: 1; order: 0; } .footer__contact .nu-title { text-transform: uppercase; line-height: 2; } .footer__contact .nu-contact { font-weight: 700; line-height: 2; } .footer__contact .nu-contact::after { content: ">"; text-align: left; padding-left: 8px; font-size: 12px; } .footer__build-nu { width: calc(58.3333% - 30px); display: flex; -webkit-box-align: center; align-items: center; -webkit-box-pack: center; justify-content: center; -webkit-box-ordinal-group: 2; order: 1; } .footer__build-nu img { margin-top: -94px; max-width: 100%; height: auto; min-width: 200px; } .footer__addres { font-size: 11.8px; width: calc(20.8333% - 30px); text-align: right; -webkit-box-ordinal-group: 3; order: 2; } .footer__copy { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; margin-left: -15px; margin-right: -15px; -webkit-box-pack: justify; justify-content: space-between; color: rgb(218, 206, 197); } .footer__copy a { color: rgb(218, 206, 197); } .footer__copy a:hover { color: rgb(218, 206, 197); opacity: 0.6; } .footer__copy .empty { width: calc(25% - 30px); } .footer__copy .soc-icon { width: calc(25% - 30px); text-align: center; } .footer__copy .soc-icon a { font-size: 1.33em; padding: 0.5em; margin: 0.1em 0.05em; } .footer__copy .copyright { width: calc(25% - 30px); text-align: right; } @media screen and (max-width: 960px) { .footer__contact { width: calc(29.1667% - 30px); } .footer__contact { text-align: left; } .footer__build-nu { width: calc(41.6667% - 30px); } .footer__build-nu img { margin-top: 0px; } .footer__addres { width: calc(29.1667% - 30px); } } @media screen and (max-width: 780px) { .footer__collapse { -webkit-box-ordinal-group: 2; display: block; width: 100%; height: 23px; min-height: 23px; } .header { min-height: 125px; display: flex; justify-content: space-around; -webkit-box-align: center; align-items: center; width: 100%; } .header__column { display: flex; } .header__log-out { margin-bottom: 10px; min-width: 100px; } .header__log-out a { color: rgb(66, 66, 66); background: url("img/disable.png") right center no-repeat transparent; width: 16px; height: 16px; } .header__nu_name.is-active a { color: rgb(50, 147, 161) !important; } .header__dropdown { box-sizing: border-box; width: 200px; box-shadow: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.14) 0px 6px 10px 0px, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.12) 0px 1px 18px 0px, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2) 0px 1px 5px -1px; transform: rotate(45deg) translateX(15px) translateY(15px); box-shadow: rgb(204, 204, 204) 0px 0px 10px 3px; } .header__dropdown ul { display: flex; -webkit-box-orient: vertical; -webkit-box-direction: normal; } .mr100 { margin-right: 100px; } .pr100 { padding-right: 100px; } .cards { box-sizing: border-box; clear: both; } .card { position: relative; padding-bottom: 30px; margin: 80px 10px; background: rgb(254, 255, 249); color: rgb(54, 54, 54); text-decoration: none; box-shadow: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.19) 0px 0px 8px 0px; border-bottom: 2px solid rgb(204, 204, 204); z-index: 2; min-height: 390px !important; } .card h5 { margin-left: 5%; margin-top: 15px !important; margin-bottom: 20px !important; } .card a { z-index: 2; color: rgb(66, 66, 66); } .card span { display: block; } .card .card-summary { padding: 5% 5% 3%; } .card .card-header { position: relative; height: 175px; overflow: hidden; background-repeat: no-repeat; background-size: cover; background-position: center center; background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.15); background-blend-mode: overlay; margin: 0px 5% 3%; } .card .card-header:focus, .card .card-header:hover { background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0); } .card .card-title { background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3); border: 2px solid rgb(255, 255, 255); padding: 3.5% 0px; color: rgb(255, 255, 255); text-transform: uppercase; position: absolute; bottom: 60px; width: 30%; left: 30%; } .card .card-title h3 { font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.2; padding: 0px 3.5%; margin: 0px; text-align: center; } .card .card-meta { max-height: 0px; overflow: hidden; color: rgb(102, 102, 102); font-size: 0.78em; text-transform: uppercase; position: absolute; bottom: 5%; padding: 0px 5%; transition-property: max-height; transition-duration: 0.4s; transition-timing-function: ease-in-out; } .card:focus, .card:hover { background: rgb(255, 255, 255); box-shadow: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.45) 0px 0px 20px 0px; } .card:focus .card-title, .card:hover .card-title { background: rgba(50, 147, 161, 0.95); } .card:focus .card-meta, .card:hover .card-meta { max-height: 1em; } .bg-cards { background: url("../img/bg-stu.svg") center center / cover no-repeat rgb(245, 246, 248); height: 460px; width: 100%; position: absolute; left: 0px; z-index: 0; margin-top: -775px; } .border__think { border: 1px solid rgb(204, 204, 204); padding: 30px 35px; } .border__dotted--bottom { border-bottom: 1px dashed rgb(204, 204, 204); } .border__dotted--top { border-top: 1px dashed rgb(204, 204, 204); } .border--left-border::before { content: ""; border-left: 1px dashed rgb(204, 204, 204); min-height: 80px; margin: -30px 0px; } .border__solid--white { border: 1px solid rgb(255, 255, 255); } .border__solid--grey { border: 1px solid rgb(204, 204, 204); } .border__solid--left { border-left: 3px solid rgb(50, 147, 161); margin-left: -15px; padding-left: 15px; } .border__solid--bottom { border-bottom: 2px solid rgb(204, 204, 204); border-top: none; margin: 15px 0px !important; } .btn { color: rgb(255, 255, 255); background-color: rgb(50, 147, 161); padding: 0.75em 2em; display: inline-block; text-decoration: none; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 0.2s, color 0.2s, border-color 0.2s; text-align: center; max-width: 100%; } .btn:hover { background-color: rgb(216, 217, 222); opacity: 0.8; color: rgb(255, 255, 255); } .btn.is-disabled { background-color: rgb(204, 204, 204); cursor: not-allowed; } .btn__fill { width: calc(100% - 4em); } .btn__hover-grey:hover { background: rgb(234, 234, 234) !important; color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; } .btn--size-small { font-size: 12px; } .btn--size-large { font-size: 20px; } .btn--style-bold { font-weight: 700; } .btn--style-lighter { font-weight: lighter; } .btn--primary { background-color: rgb(9, 66, 93); } .btn--primary:hover { background-color: rgb(216, 217, 222); opacity: 0.8; color: rgb(255, 255, 255); } .btn--secondary { background-color: rgb(10, 49, 64); } .btn--secondary:hover { background-color: rgb(216, 217, 222); opacity: 0.8; color: rgb(255, 255, 255); } .btn--tertiary { background-color: rgb(216, 217, 222); } .btn--tertiary:hover { background-color: rgb(216, 217, 222); opacity: 0.8; color: rgb(255, 255, 255); } .btn--grey { background-color: rgb(144, 145, 147); } .btn--grey:hover { background-color: rgb(216, 217, 222); opacity: 0.8; color: rgb(255, 255, 255); } .btn--bordered-base { background: rgb(255, 255, 255); border: 1px solid rgb(50, 147, 161); color: rgb(50, 147, 161); } .btn--bordered-base:hover { background: rgb(255, 255, 255); color: rgb(38, 111, 122); border-color: rgb(38, 111, 122); } .btn--bordered-primary { background: rgb(255, 255, 255); border: 1px solid rgb(9, 66, 93); color: rgb(9, 66, 93); } .btn--bordered-primary:hover { background: rgb(255, 255, 255); color: rgb(5, 33, 47); border-color: rgb(5, 33, 47); } .btn--bordered-secondary { background: rgb(255, 255, 255); border: 1px solid rgb(10, 49, 64); color: rgb(10, 49, 64); } .btn--bordered-secondary:hover { background: rgb(255, 255, 255); color: rgb(3, 15, 20); border-color: rgb(3, 15, 20); } .btn--bordered-tertiary { background: rgb(255, 255, 255); border: 1px solid rgb(216, 217, 222); color: rgb(216, 217, 222); } .btn--bordered-tertiary:hover { background: rgb(255, 255, 255); color: rgb(188, 190, 199); border-color: rgb(188, 190, 199); } .btn--caps-uppercase { text-transform: uppercase; } .btn--caps-none { text-transform: none; } .btn--color-black { color: rgb(66, 66, 66); } .btn--color-white { color: rgb(255, 255, 255); } .btn--color-turquoise { color: rgb(50, 147, 161); } .btn--radius-thin { border-radius: 4px; } .btn--radius-thick { border-radius: 14px; } .btn--radius-round { border-radius: 30px; } .btn--border-bottom-thin { border-bottom: 1px solid rgb(204, 204, 204); } .btn--border-bottom-thick { border-bottom: 3px solid rgb(204, 204, 204); } .noh img { height: 450px; } .table { width: 100%; } .table td { float: inherit !important; } .table.table_theme-bg1 { background-color: rgb(236, 239, 241); border-collapse: collapse; cursor: default; margin-bottom: 1.3rem; text-align: left; } .table.table_theme-bg1 .table__cell, .table.table_theme-bg1 .table__cell-heading { font-weight: 400; padding: 0.5rem 1rem; } .table.table_theme-bg1 .table__cell-heading { border-bottom: 2px solid rgb(38, 50, 56); } .table.table_theme-bg1 .table__row:hover { color: rgba(37, 49, 55, 0.5); } .table.table_theme-bg1 .table__row:first-child:hover { color: inherit; } .table.table_theme-bg2 { background-color: rgb(236, 239, 241); border-collapse: collapse; cursor: default; margin-bottom: 1.3rem; text-align: left; } .table.table_theme-bg2 .table__cell, .table.table_theme-bg2 .table__cell-heading { font-weight: 400; padding: 0.5rem 1rem; } .table.table_theme-bg2 .table__cell { border-bottom: 1px solid rgb(207, 216, 220); } .table.table_theme-bg2 .table__cell-heading { border-bottom: 2px solid rgb(38, 50, 56); } .table.table_theme-bg2 .table__row:hover { color: rgba(37, 49, 55, 0.5); } .table.table_theme-bg2 .table__row:first-child:hover { color: inherit; } .table.table_theme-bg3 { background-color: rgb(236, 239, 241); border-collapse: collapse; cursor: default; margin-bottom: 1.3rem;
