transition: 0.2s ease-in; } .table.table_theme-bg3 .table__row:first-child:hover { background-color: inherit; transition: 0.2s ease-in; } .table.table_theme-bg4 { background-color: rgb(236, 239, 241); border-collapse: collapse; cursor: default; margin-bottom: 1.3rem; text-align: left; } .table.table_theme-bg4 .table__cell-heading { border-bottom: 2px solid rgb(38, 50, 56); } .table.table_theme-bg4 .table__cell, .table.table_theme-bg4 .table__cell-heading { font-weight: 400; padding: 0.5rem 0px; } .table.table_theme-bg4 .table__cell-heading:nth-child(n), .table.table_theme-bg4 .table__cell:nth-child(n) { border-left: 1rem solid rgb(236, 239, 241); border-right: 1rem solid rgb(236, 239, 241); } .table.table_theme-bg5 { background-color: rgba(237, 240, 242, 0.5); border-collapse: collapse; cursor: default; margin-bottom: 1.3rem; text-align: left; } .table.table_theme-bg5 .table__cell, .table.table_theme-bg5 .table__cell-heading { border-bottom: 1px solid rgb(236, 239, 241); font-weight: 400; padding: 0.5rem 1rem; } .table.table_theme-bg5 .table__cell-heading { background-color: rgb(236, 239, 241); } .table.table_theme-bg5 .table__row:hover { background-color: rgba(237, 240, 242, 0.5); transition: 0.1s; } .table.table_theme-bg5 .table__row:first-child:hover { background-color: inherit; transition: 0.1s; } .table.table_theme-bg6 { background-color: rgb(236, 239, 241); border-collapse: collapse; cursor: default; margin-bottom: 1.3rem; text-align: left; } .table.table_theme-bg6 .table__row:first-child { border-top: 0.5rem solid rgb(176, 190, 197); } .table.table_theme-bg6 .table__row:last-child { border-bottom: 0.5rem solid rgb(176, 190, 197); } .table.table_theme-bg6 .table__cell, .table.table_theme-bg6 .table__cell-heading { border-left: 1px solid rgb(176, 190, 197); border-right: 1px solid rgb(176, 190, 197); font-weight: 400; padding: 0.5rem 1rem; } .table.table_theme-bg7 { background-color: rgb(236, 239, 241); border-collapse: collapse; cursor: default; margin-bottom: 1.3rem; text-align: left; } .table.table_theme-bg7 .table__cell, .table.table_theme-bg7 .table__cell-heading { font-weight: 400; padding: 0.5rem 1rem; } .table.table_theme-bg7 .table__row:nth-child(2n) { background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); } .table.table_theme-bg8 { background-color: rgb(236, 239, 241); border: 1px solid rgb(176, 190, 197); border-collapse: collapse; cursor: default; margin-bottom: 1.3rem; text-align: left; } .table.table_theme-bg8 .table__cell, .table.table_theme-bg8 .table__cell-heading { font-weight: 400; padding: 0.5rem 1rem; } .table.table_theme-bg8 .table__row:hover { background-color: rgb(176, 190, 197); transition: 0.2s ease-in; } .table.table_theme-bg8 .table__row:first-child { border-bottom: 1px dashed rgb(176, 190, 197); } .table.table_theme-bg8 .table__row:first-child:hover { background-color: inherit; transition: 0.2s ease-in; } .table.table_theme-bg9 { background-color: rgb(236, 239, 241); border: 1px solid rgb(176, 190, 197); border-collapse: collapse; cursor: default; margin-bottom: 1.3rem; text-align: left; } .table.table_theme-bg9 .table__cell, .table.table_theme-bg9 .table__cell-heading { font-weight: 400; padding: 0.5rem 1rem; } .table.table_theme-bg9 .table__row:nth-child(n+2) { background-color: rgb(207, 216, 220); border-bottom: 1px dashed rgb(176, 190, 197); border-top: 1px dashed rgb(176, 190, 197); } .table.table_theme-bg9 .table__row:first-child:hover { background-color: inherit; transition: 0.2s ease-in; } .table.table_theme-bg9 .table__row:hover { background-color: rgb(176, 190, 197); transition: 0.2s ease-in; } .table.table.table_theme-bg10 { border: 1px solid rgb(176, 190, 197); border-collapse: collapse; cursor: default; margin-bottom: 1.3rem; text-align: left; } .table.table.table_theme-bg10 .table__cell, .table.table.table_theme-bg10 .table__cell-heading { font-weight: 400; padding: 0.5rem 1rem; } .table.table.table_theme-bg10 .table__cell { border-right: 1px dashed rgb(120, 144, 156); } .table.table.table_theme-bg10 .table__cell-heading { padding: 2rem 1rem; border-left: 1px solid rgb(38, 50, 56); border-right: 1px solid rgb(38, 50, 56); border-top: 1px solid rgb(38, 50, 56); } .layoutRow { width: 100%; } .fc td, .fc th { float: none; } .table-border { border-radius: 1em; overflow: hidden; border-collapse: separate; border-spacing: 10px; } .table-border td, .table-border th { padding: 1em; margin: 10px; border: 1px solid rgb(204, 204, 204); } select { appearance: none; outline: 0px; box-shadow: none; background: none rgb(255, 255, 255); border: 0px !important; } .select__arrow { position: relative; display: block; line-height: 3; overflow: hidden; border: 1px solid rgb(222, 222, 222); background: rgb(255, 255, 255); } .select__arrow select { width: 100%; height: 100%; margin: 0px; padding: 0px 0px 0px 0.5em; color: rgb(66, 66, 66); cursor: pointer; } .select__arrow::after { content: "ï¸"; font: 14px / 1 FontAwesome; position: absolute; top: 15px; right: 0px; bottom: 0px; padding: 0px 1em; background: rgb(255, 255, 255); pointer-events: none; color: rgb(204, 204, 204); } .select__arrow:hover::after { color: rgb(50, 147, 161); } .select__arrow::after { transition: 0.25s; } .select select#slct option:checked, .select select#slct option:hover { color: rgb(255, 255, 255); background: rgb(97, 71, 103); } input { appearance: none; outline: 0px; box-shadow: none; background: none rgb(255, 255, 255); } .input__border { position: relative; display: block; line-height: 3; overflow: hidden; border: 1px solid rgb(222, 222, 222); background: rgb(255, 255, 255); } .input__border input { width: 100%; height: 100%; margin: 0px; padding: 0px 0px 0px 0.5em; color: rgb(66, 66, 66); border: 0px !important; } .input__border label { display: none; } textarea { appearance: none; outline: 0px; overflow: auto; box-shadow: none; border: 1px solid rgb(222, 222, 222); background: none rgb(255, 255, 255); } .accordion { min-height: 0px; background-color: rgb(254, 255, 250); } .accordion p { position: relative; overflow: hidden; max-height: 800px; opacity: 1; transform: translate(0px, 0px); margin-top: 14px; z-index: 2; transition: 0.5s; } .accordion p, .accordion ul li i::after, .accordion ul li i::before { transition: 0.25s ease-in-out; } .accordion ul { list-style: none; padding: 0px; margin: 0px; } .accordion ul li { position: relative; padding: 18px 0px 4px; margin: 0px; border-top: 1px dotted rgb(220, 231, 235); } .accordion ul li i { position: absolute; transform: translate(-6px, 0px); margin-top: 9px; right: 0px; } .accordion ul li i::after, .accordion ul li i::before { content: ""; position: absolute; background-color: rgb(0, 0, 0); width: 3px; height: 16px; } .accordion ul li i::before { transform: translate(2px, 0px) rotate(45deg); } .accordion ul li i::after { transform: translate(2px, 0px) rotate(-45deg); } .accordion ul li input[type="checkbox"] { position: absolute; cursor: pointer; width: 100%; height: 100%; z-index: 1; opacity: 0; } .accordion ul li input[type="checkbox"]:checked ~ p { margin-top: 0px; max-height: 0px; opacity: 0; transform: translate(0px, 50%); } .accordion ul li input[type="checkbox"]:checked ~ i::before { margin-top: 9px; height: 9px; transform: translate(2px, 0px) rotate(45deg); } .accordion ul li input[type="checkbox"]:checked ~ i::after { margin-top: 9px; height: 9px; transform: translate(-2px, 0px) rotate(-45deg); } .accordion ul li:nth-of-type(1) { border-top: none; } .accordion ul li:last-of-type { padding-bottom: 0px; } @-webkit-keyframes bounceInUp { 0% { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(2000px); } 60% { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(-30px); } 80% { transform: translateY(10px); } 100% { transform: translateY(0px); } } @keyframes bounceInUp { 0% { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(2000px); } 60% { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(-30px); } 80% { transform: translateY(10px); } 100% { transform: translateY(0px); } } .checkbox__wrapper { display: block; position: relative; padding-left: 30px; margin-bottom: 15px; cursor: pointer; font-size: 18px; } .checkbox--hidden { display: none; } .checkbox--show { box-sizing: border-box; position: absolute; top: 2px; left: 0px; height: 20px; width: 20px; border: 1px solid rgb(221, 221, 221); border-radius: 4px; background: rgb(255, 255, 255); } .checkbox--show::after { content: ""; position: absolute; display: none; left: 7px; top: 5px; width: 3px; height: 7px; border-style: solid; border-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); border-image: initial; border-width: 0px 3px 3px 0px; transform: rotate(45deg); } .checkbox--hidden:checked ~ .checkbox--show::after { display: block; } .checkbox--primary:checked ~ .checkbox--show { background: rgb(50, 147, 161); border: none; } .checkbox--primary:disabled ~ .checkbox--show { background: rgb(255, 255, 255); border: 1px solid rgb(250, 250, 250); cursor: not-allowed; } .checkbox--primary:checked:disabled ~ .checkbox--show { background: rgb(50, 147, 161); opacity: 0.6; cursor: not-allowed; } .thumbnail { max-width: 200px; } .lightbox { display: none; position: fixed; z-index: 999; width: 30%; height: 50%; text-align: center; top: 30%; left: 30%; background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3); } .lightbox img { max-width: 90%; max-height: 80%; margin-top: 2%; } .lightbox:target { outline: 0px; display: block; } .popup { display: flex; -webkit-box-align: center; align-items: center; -webkit-box-pack: center; justify-content: center; position: fixed; width: 100vw; height: 100vh; bottom: 0px; right: 0px; background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.8); z-index: 2; visibility: hidden; opacity: 0; transition: 0.64s ease-in-out; } .popup-inner { position: relative; bottom: -100vw; right: -100vh; display: flex; -webkit-box-align: start; align-items: flex-start; max-width: 800px; max-height: 600px; width: 60%; background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); transform: rotate(32deg); transition: 0.64s ease-in-out; } .popup__photo { display: flex; -webkit-box-pack: end; justify-content: flex-end; -webkit-box-align: end; align-items: flex-end; width: 40%; height: 100%; overflow: hidden; padding: 4rem 1rem; } .popup__photo img { width: auto; height: 100%; } .popup__text { display: flex; -webkit-box-orient: vertical; -webkit-box-direction: normal; flex-direction: column; -webkit-box-pack: center; justify-content: center; width: 100%; height: 100%; padding: 4rem 4rem 0px; } .popup__text.rem-m { margin-left: -4rem; } .popup__text h1 { font-size: 2rem; font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 2rem; text-transform: uppercase; color: rgb(10, 10, 10); } .popup__text p { font-size: 0.875rem; color: rgb(104, 104, 104); line-height: 1.5; } .popup:target { visibility: visible; opacity: 1; } .popup:target .popup-inner { bottom: 0px; right: 0px; transform: rotate(0deg); } .popup__close { position: absolute; right: 0px; top: 0px; width: 3rem; height: 3rem; font-size: 18px; font-weight: 300; z-index: 4; color: rgb(255, 255, 255); text-align: center; cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none; line-height: 1.5; } .pagination { display: inline-block; padding: 0px; margin: 18px 0px; } .pagination i { color: rgb(127, 140, 141); } .pagination i:hover { color: rgb(255, 255, 255); } .pagination li { display: inline; margin: 3px; } .pagination li a { color: rgb(0, 0, 0); padding: 8px 16px; text-decoration: none; border: 1px solid rgb(221, 221, 221); } .pagination li a.active { background-color: rgb(50, 147, 163); color: rgb(255, 255, 255); border: 4px solid rgb(50, 147, 163); } .pagination li a:hover { background-color: rgb(50, 147, 163); color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; } .pagination li a:hover i { color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; } .round-images__image { min-width: 200px; padding-right: 20px; } .round-images__thumbnail { border-radius: 50%; width: 250px; height: 200px; object-fit: cover; } .bx-wrapper { position: relative; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%); padding: 0px; clear: both; } .bx-wrapper img { max-width: 100%; display: block; margin-bottom: 20px; } .bxslider { top: -12px; } .bx-wrapper .bx-viewport { background: rgb(255, 255, 255); } .bx-wrapper .bx-pager { display: none; } .bx-wrapper .bx-controls-auto { position: absolute; bottom: -30px; width: 100%; } .bx-wrapper .bx-loading { min-height: 50px; height: 100%; width: 100%; position: absolute; top: 0px; left: 0px; z-index: 2000; } .bx-wrapper .bx-controls-auto .bx-controls-auto-item { display: inline-block; } .bx-wrapper .bx-prev { left: 10px; } .bx-wrapper .bx-prev::before { font-family: FontAwesome; content: "ï„„"; position: absolute; left: 50%; top: 50%; transform: translate(-50%, -50%); } .bx-wrapper .bx-next { right: 10px; } .bx-wrapper .bx-next::before { font-family: FontAwesome; content: "ï„…"; position: absolute; left: 50%; top: 50%; transform: translate(-50%, -50%); } .bx-wrapper .bx-controls-direction a { position: absolute; bottom: 10px; transform: translateY(-50%); outline: 0px; width: 40px; height: 40px; font-size: 40px; z-index: 9999; background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.7); } .bx-wrapper .bx-controls-direction a:hover { opacity: 0.9; } .bx-wrapper .bx-controls-direction a:hover::before { left: 45%; } .bx-wrapper .bx-controls-direction a.bx-next:hover::before { left: 55%; } .bx-wrapper .bx-controls-direction a.disabled { display: none; } .bx-wrapper .bx-controls-auto { text-align: center; } .bx-wrapper .bx-controls-auto .bx-start { display: block; text-indent: -9999px; width: 10px; height: 11px; outline: 0px; margin: 0px 3px; } .bx-wrapper .bx-controls-auto .bx-start.active, .bx-wrapper .bx-controls-auto .bx-start:hover { background-position: -86px 0px; } .bx-wrapper .bx-controls-auto .bx-stop { display: block; text-indent: -9999px; width: 9px; height: 11px; outline: 0px; margin: 0px 3px; } .bx-wrapper .bx-controls-auto .bx-stop.active, .bx-wrapper .bx-controls-auto .bx-stop:hover { background-position: -86px -33px; } .bx-wrapper .bx-controls.bx-has-controls-auto.bx-has-pager .bx-pager { text-align: left; width: 80%; } .bx-wrapper .bx-controls.bx-has-controls-auto.bx-has-pager .bx-controls-auto { right: 0px; width: 35px; } .bx-wrapper .bx-caption { position: absolute; bottom: 0px; left: 0px; background: rgba(80, 80, 80, 0.75); width: 100%; } .bx-wrapper .bx-caption span { color: rgb(255, 255, 255); font-family: Arial; display: block; font-size: 0.85em; padding: 10px; } @font-face { font-family: FontAwesome; src: url("../fonts/fontawesome-webfont.woff2?v=4.7.0") format("woff2"), url("../fonts/fontawesome-webfont.woff?v=4.7.0") format("woff"), url("../fonts/fontawesome-webfont.ttf?v=4.7.0") format("truetype"); font-weight: 400; font-style: normal; } .fa { display: inline-block; font-style: normal; font-variant: normal; font-size-adjust: none; font-language-override: normal; font-kerning: auto; font-optical-sizing: auto; font-feature-settings: normal; font-variation-settings: normal; font-weight: normal; font-stretch: normal; line-height: 1; font-family: FontAwesome; font-size: inherit; text-rendering: auto; -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased; } .fa-lg { font-size: 1.33333em; line-height: 0.75em; vertical-align: -15%; } .fa-2x { font-size: 2em; } .fa-3x { font-size: 3em; } .fa-4x { font-size: 4em; } .fa-5x { font-size: 5em; } .fa-fw { width: 1.28571em; text-align: center; } .fa-ul { padding-left: 0px; margin-left: 2.14286em; list-style-type: none; } .fa-ul > li { position: relative; } .fa-li { position: absolute; left: -2.14286em; width: 2.14286em; top: 0.14286em; text-align: center; } .fa-li.fa-lg { left: -1.85714em; } .fa-border { padding: 0.2em 0.25em 0.15em; border: 0.08em solid rgb(238, 238, 238); border-radius: 0.1em; } .fa-pull-left { float: left; } .fa-pull-right { float: right; } .fa.fa-pull-left { margin-right: 0.3em; } .fa.fa-pull-right { margin-left: 0.3em; } .pull-right { float: right; } .pull-left { float: left; } .fa.pull-left { margin-right: 0.3em; } .fa.pull-right { margin-left: 0.3em; } .fa-spin { animation: 2s linear 0s infinite normal none running fa-spin; } .fa-pulse { animation: 1s steps(8) 0s infinite normal none running fa-spin; } @-webkit-keyframes fa-spin { 0% { transform: rotate(0deg); } 100% { transform: rotate(359deg); } } @keyframes fa-spin { 0% { transform: rotate(0deg); } 100% { transform: rotate(359deg); } } .fa-rotate-90 { transform: rotate(90deg); } .fa-rotate-180 { transform: rotate(180deg); } .fa-rotate-270 { transform: rotate(270deg); } .fa-flip-horizontal { transform: scale(-1, 1); } .fa-flip-vertical { transform: scale(1, -1); } :root .fa-flip-horizontal, :root .fa-flip-vertical, :root .fa-rotate-180, :root .fa-rotate-270, :root .fa-rotate-90 { filter: none; } .fa-stack { position: relative; display: inline-block; width: 2em; height: 2em; line-height: 2em; vertical-align: middle; } .fa-stack-1x, .fa-stack-2x { position: absolute; left: 0px; width: 100%; text-align: center; } .fa-wpexplorer::before { content: "ï‹ž"; } .fa-meetup::before { content: "ï‹ "; } .sr-only { position: absolute; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding: 0px; margin: -1px; overflow: hidden; clip: rect(0px, 0px, 0px, 0px); border: 0px; } .sr-only-focusable:active, .sr-only-focusable:focus { position: static; width: auto; height: auto; margin: 0px; overflow: visible; clip: auto; } body, html { width: 100%; font-family: "Open Sans", "Open Sans", Roboto, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; } body blockquote, body body, body code, body dd, body div, body dl, body dt, body fieldset, body form, body h1, body h2, body h3, body h4, body h5, body h6, body input, body li, body p, body pre, body td, body textarea, body th, body ul, html blockquote, html body, html code, html dd, html div, html dl, html dt, html fieldset, html form, html h1, html h2, html h3, html h4, html h5, html h6, html input, html li, html p, html pre, html td, html textarea, html th, html ul { margin: 0px; padding: 0px; } body table, html table { border-collapse: collapse; border-spacing: 0px; } body abbr, body fieldset, body img, html abbr, html fieldset, html img { border: 0px; } body sup, html sup { vertical-align: text-top; } body sub, html sub { vertical-align: text-bottom; } body input, body select, body textarea, html input, html select, html textarea { font-family: inherit; font-size: inherit; font-weight: inherit; } body legend, html legend { color: rgb(0, 0, 0); } body article, body aside, body details, body figcaption, body figure, body footer, body header, body hgroup, body main, body menu, body nav, body section, html article, html aside, html details, html figcaption, html figure, html footer, html header, html hgroup, html main, html menu, html nav, html section { display: block; } body img, html img { max-width: 100%; height: auto; } * { margin: 0px; padding: 0px; } body, html { height: 100%; } body { display: flex; -webkit-box-orient: vertical; -webkit-box-direction: normal; flex-direction: column; } p { padding: 5px 0px; margin: 0px; } @-webkit-keyframes fade-in { 0% { opacity: 0.1; } 100% { opacity: 1; } } @keyframes fade-in { 0% { opacity: 0.1; } 100% { opacity: 1; } } body { animation: 1s linear 0s 1 normal none running fade-in; background: rgb(249, 249, 249); } .wrapper { display: flex; -webkit-box-orient: vertical; -webkit-box-direction: normal; flex-direction: column; overflow: hidden; } .main-v { -webkit-box-flex: 1; flex: 1 0 auto; } h6 { } h5 { } h4 { } h3 { } h2 { } h1 { } h1, h2, h3, h4, h5, h6 { padding: 0px; margin: 0px; } a { text-decoration: none; color: rgb(50, 147, 161); } a:hover { color: rgb(105, 195, 208); text-decoration: none; } .view-port { max-width: 1200px; margin: 0px auto; padding-left: 15px; padding-right: 15px; width: 100%; } .wrapper { display: flex; -webkit-box-orient: vertical; -webkit-box-direction: normal; flex-direction: column; width: 100%; -webkit-box-flex: 1; flex: 1 0 auto; } .first-screen { display: flex; -webkit-box-orient: vertical; -webkit-box-direction: normal; flex-direction: column; -webkit-box-flex: 1; flex-grow: 1; height: 100vh; } .hide { display: none !important; } .clear { padding: 0px; margin: 0px; } .clear::after { display: block; content: ""; clear: both; } main { min-height: calc(-70px + 100vh); } .ucase { text-transform: uppercase; } .ucase__bold { font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; } .user__faculty, .wcolor { color: rgb(255, 255, 255); } .gcolor { color: rgb(127, 140, 141); } .main-v .wpsPortletBody { font-size: 14px; color: rgb(91, 91, 81); } .main-v .b-sidenav { max-width: 250px; min-width: 250px; } .main-v .b-sidenav #picId { display: none; } .main-v .b-sidenav .menu-hide { display: block !important; background: rgb(212, 213, 215) !important; } .main-v .b-sidenav .menu-hide a { color: rgb(91, 91, 81) !important; } .main-v .b-sidenav ul { padding: 0px; margin: 0px; } .main-v .b-sidenav ul li { list-style: none; margin: 0px; background: rgb(225, 226, 230); border-bottom: 3px solid rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; } .main-v .b-sidenav ul li:last-child { border: none !important; } .main-v .b-sidenav ul li .current-sub { padding: 10px 20px; border-left: 3px solid rgb(50, 147, 161); font-size: 14px; border-top: 3px solid rgb(255, 255, 255); color: rgb(91, 91, 81); background: rgb(212, 213, 215) !important; text-transform: uppercase !important; } .main-v .b-sidenav ul li a { font-size: 14px; color: rgb(91, 91, 81); text-decoration: none; text-transform: uppercase; display: block; padding: 10px 20px; } .main-v .b-sidenav ul li a:hover { display: block; padding: 10px 20px; background: rgb(212, 213, 215) !important; } .main-v .b-sidenav ul li.active ~ ul li { background: 0px 0px !important; } .main-v .b-sidenav ul li.active ~ ul li.active a { text-transform: none !important; font-weight: 400; } .main-v .b-sidenav ul li.active ~ ul li.current { background: rgb(204, 204, 204) !important; } .main-v .b-sidenav ul li.active ~ ul li:first-child { border-top: 1px solid rgb(204, 204, 204); } .main-v .b-sidenav ul li.active ~ ul li:last-child { border-bottom: none !important; } .main-v .b-sidenav ul ul li a { text-transform: none !important; padding-left: 35px !important; margin: 0px !important; font-weight: 400 !important; background: rgb(245, 245, 245) !important; } .main-v .b-sidenav ul ul li.active.current a { background: rgb(223, 226, 227) !important; } .fa-wpexplorer::before { content: "ï‹ž"; } .fa-meetup::before { content: "ï‹ "; } .sr-only { position: absolute; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding: 0px; margin: -1px; overflow: hidden; clip: rect(0px, 0px, 0px, 0px); border: 0px; } .sr-only-focusable:active, .sr-only-focusable:focus { position: static; width: auto; height: auto; margin: 0px; overflow: visible; clip: auto; } .sm { box-sizing: border-box; position: relative; z-index: 2; -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent; } .sm, .sm li, .sm ul { display: block; list-style: none; padding: 0px; line-height: normal; direction: ltr; text-align: left; } .sm-rtl, .sm-rtl li, .sm-rtl ul { direction: rtl; text-align: right; } .sm > li > h1, .sm > li > h2, .sm > li > h3, .sm > li > h4, .sm > li > h5, .sm > li > h6 { margin: 0px; padding: 0px; } .sm ul { display: none; } .sm a, .sm li { position: relative; } .sm a { display: block; } .sm a.disabled { cursor: default; } .sm::after { content: ""; display: block; height: 0px; font: 0px / 0 "Open Sans"; clear: both; overflow: hidden; } .sm *, .sm ::after, .sm ::before { box-sizing: inherit; } .sm ul li .has-submenu .sub-arrow { position: unset; margin-top: 5px; float: right !important; } .sm li ul li, .sm li ul li a { position: unset !important; } .sm-mint { border-top: 0px solid rgb(255, 255, 255); border-bottom: 0px solid rgb(255, 255, 255); background: rgb(50, 147, 161); } .sm-mint a, .sm-mint a:active, .sm-mint a:focus, .sm-mint a:hover { padding: 13px 58px 13px 20px; color: rgb(255, 255, 255); font-family: "Open Sans", "Open Sans", Roboto; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; line-height: 17px; text-decoration: none; } .sm-mint a.current { background: rgb(67, 169, 183); } .sm-mint a.disabled { color: rgb(204, 204, 204) !important; } .sm-mint a .sub-arrow { position: absolute; top: 50%; margin-top: -17px; left: auto; right: 24px; width: 34px; height: 34px; overflow: hidden; text-align: center; text-shadow: none; background: rgba(234, 235, 237, 0.2); border-radius: 0px; font: bold 14px / 34px monospace !important; } .sm-mint a .sub-arrow::before { content: "+"; } .sm-mint a.highlighted .sub-arrow::before { content: "-"; } .sm-mint li { border-top: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1); } .sm-mint > li:first-child { border-top: 0px; } .sm-mint ul { background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2); } .sm-mint ul a, .sm-mint ul a:active, .sm-mint ul a:focus, .sm-mint ul a:hover { font-size: 14px; border-left: 8px solid transparent; } .nav { background: rgb(50, 147, 161); } .nav button[aria-expanded="false"], .nav button[aria-expanded="true"] { padding: 20px !important; } .nav button[aria-expanded="true"] { background: rgb(38, 111, 122) !important; } .nav .btn__first i { font-size: 28px; line-height: 0; } .nav .btn__first .title-menu { font-size: 18px; padding-left: 10px; line-height: 0; } .nav button[aria-expanded="false"] .fa-times, .nav button[aria-expanded="true"] .fa-bars { display: none; } .nav #collapse-headermenu { display: none; border: none; background: unset; color: rgb(255, 255, 255); font-size: 22px; text-transform: uppercase; width: 100%; text-align: left; font-family: arial; } .nav #collapse-headermenu:hover { cursor: pointer; } .nav .collapse.show { max-height: 99em; transition: max-height 0.5s ease-in-out; } .nav .collapse.show:not(.show) { display: none !important; } .nav ul li { border-left: 1px solid rgb(67, 169, 183); } .nav ul li:last-child { border-right: 1px solid rgb(67, 169, 183); } .nav ul li:first-child a { width: 40px; height: 40px; padding: 10px; font-size: 0px; } .nav ul li:first-child a::before { background-image: url("../img/home.png"); height: 20px; width: 20px; position: absolute; display: block !important; content: "" !important; background-size: cover !important; background-position: 50% 0px !important; } .nav ul li:first-child a .sub-arrow { display: none; } .nav ul li ul li, .nav ul li ul li ul li, .nav ul li ul li ul li ul li { border-left: none; } .nav ul li ul li a, .nav ul li ul li ul li a, .nav ul li ul li ul li ul li a { font-size: 14px !important; padding: 13px 20px !important; width: 100% !important; height: 100% !important; } .nav ul li ul li a::before, .nav ul li ul li ul li a::before, .nav ul li ul li ul li ul li a::before { font-style: inherit; font-variant: inherit; font-stretch: inherit; font-size: inherit; font-family: inherit; font-optical-sizing: inherit; font-size-adjust: inherit; font-kerning: inherit; font-feature-settings: inherit; font-variation-settings: inherit; font-language-override: inherit; text-rendering: auto; font-weight: 900; line-height: normal; padding-left: 0px; display: none; position: inherit; content: " " !important; color: inherit !important; background-image: unset !important; } .nav ul li ul li a .sub-arrow, .nav ul li ul li ul li a .sub-arrow, .nav ul li ul li ul li ul li a .sub-arrow { display: block !important; } .nav ul li ul li ul li ul li:last-child, .nav ul li ul li ul li:last-child, .nav ul li ul li:last-child { border-right: none; } .nav ul li ul li ul li ul li:first-child a, .nav ul li ul li ul li:first-child a, .nav ul li ul li:first-child a { font-size: 14px; padding: 13px 20px; } .nav ul li ul li ul li ul li:first-child a::before, .nav ul li ul li ul li:first-child a::before, .nav ul li ul li:first-child a::before { font-style: inherit; font-variant: inherit; font-stretch: inherit; font-size: inherit; font-family: inherit; font-optical-sizing: inherit; font-size-adjust: inherit; font-kerning: inherit; font-feature-settings: inherit; font-variation-settings: inherit; font-language-override: inherit; text-rendering: auto; font-weight: 900; content: ""; color: inherit; line-height: normal; padding-left: 0px; } @media (min-width: 781px) { .sm-mint ul { position: absolute; width: 12em; } .sm-mint li { float: left; } .sm-mint.sm-rtl li { float: right; } .sm-mint ul li, .sm-mint.sm-rtl ul li, .sm-mint.sm-vertical li { float: none; } .sm-mint a { white-space: nowrap; } .sm-mint ul a, .sm-mint.sm-vertical a { white-space: normal; } .sm-mint .sm-nowrap > li > :not(ul) a, .sm-mint .sm-nowrap > li > a { white-space: nowrap; } .sm-mint { border-top: 0px; background: rgb(50, 147, 161); } .sm-mint a, .sm-mint a.highlighted, .sm-mint a:active, .sm-mint a:focus, .sm-mint a:hover { padding: 12px 28.5px; color: rgb(255, 255, 255); border-radius: 0px; text-transform: uppercase; } .sm-mint a:active, .sm-mint a:focus, .sm-mint a:hover { background: rgb(67, 169, 183); color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; } .sm-mint a.highlighted { background: rgb(67, 169, 183); color: rgb(255, 255, 255); box-shadow: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.25) 0px 4px 3px; } .sm-mint a.disabled { background: 0px 0px; color: rgb(204, 204, 204); box-shadow: none; } .sm-mint a.has-submenu { padding-right: 42.5px; } .sm-mint a .sub-arrow { top: 50%; margin-top: -3px; right: 28.5px; width: 0px; height: 0px; border-width: 6px 4.02px 0px; border-style: solid dashed dashed; } .sm-mint li { border-top: 0px; } .sm-mint ul { border: 0px; border-radius: 0px; background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); } .sm-mint ul ul { border-radius: 0px; z-index: 1; } .sm-mint ul a, .sm-mint ul a.highlighted, .sm-mint ul a:active, .sm-mint ul a:focus, .sm-mint ul a:hover { padding: 10px 20px; } .sm-mint ul a.disabled .sub-arrow { border-color: transparent transparent transparent rgb(255, 255, 255); } .sm-mint ul ul { background: rgb(255, 255, 255); } .sm-mint ul ul a:hover { background: rgb(227, 228, 230) !important; } .sm-mint .scroll-down, .sm-mint .scroll-up { position: absolute; display: none; visibility: hidden; overflow: hidden; background: rgb(67, 169, 183); height: 20px; } .sm-mint .scroll-down-arrow, .sm-mint .scroll-up-arrow { position: absolute; top: 6px; left: 50%; margin-left: -8px; width: 0px; height: 0px; overflow: hidden; border-width: 0px 6px 8px; border-style: dashed dashed solid; border-color: transparent transparent rgb(255, 255, 255); } .sm-mint .scroll-down-arrow { border-width: 8px 6px 0px; border-style: solid dashed dashed; border-color: rgb(255, 255, 255) transparent transparent; } .sm-mint.sm-rtl a.has-submenu { padding-right: 28.5px; } } @media screen and (max-width: 960px) { .sm ul li .has-submenu .sub-arrow { margin-top: -8.6px; } } @media screen and (max-width: 780px) { .sm ul li .has-submenu .sub-arrow { margin-top: -10.6px; } .nav #collapse-headermenu { display: flex; } .nav .collapse { max-height: 0px; } .nav .collapse { overflow: hidden; } .nav .collapse { transition: max-height 0.5s cubic-bezier(0, 1, 0, 1); } .nav ul li { border-left: none; } .nav ul li:first-child { border-top: 1px solid rgb(67, 169, 183); } .nav ul li:first-child a::before { margin-left: 15px; } } @media screen and (max-width: 560px) { .sm .has-submenu { position: inherit; } .sm ul li .has-submenu .sub-arrow { margin-top: -18px; } .sm ul li .has-submenu .sub-arrow { float: inherit; } .sm ul li .has-submenu .sub-arrow { position: absolute; } .sm li ul li, .sm li ul li a { position: relative !important; } .sm ul li ul { top: auto; } .nav ul li:first-child a { width: 100%; } .nav ul li:first-child a { height: 100%; } .nav ul li:first-child a { max-height: 40px; } .nav ul li:first-child a { margin-bottom: 4px; } .nav ul li:first-child a::before { margin-left: 15px; } .nav ul li:first-child a .sub-arrow { display: block; } } .package { display: flex; -webkit-box-orient: vertical; -webkit-box-direction: normal; flex-direction: column; background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); -webkit-box-pack: center; justify-content: center; } .package__tiles { display: flex; justify-content: space-around; margin-top: -300px; margin-bottom: 80px; height: 600px; } .package__tile { position: relative; display: flex; -webkit-box-orient: vertical; -webkit-box-direction: normal; flex-direction: column; width: 18%; padding: 20px; background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); box-shadow: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5) 0px 0px 10px; } .package__tile::before { position: absolute; display: block; content: " "; left: 0px; top: 0px; width: 100%; height: 3px; } .package__tile--yellow .item__value { color: rgb(249, 212, 35); } .package__tile--yellow .tile__cost { border-bottom-color: rgb(249, 212, 35) !important; } .package__tile--yellow::before { background-color: rgb(249, 212, 35); } .package__tile--grey .item__value { color: rgb(127, 140, 141); } .package__tile--grey .tile__cost { border-bottom-color: rgb(127, 140, 141) !important; } .package__tile--grey::before { background-color: rgb(127, 140, 141); } .package__tile--red .item__value { color: rgb(248, 95, 64); } .package__tile--red .tile__cost { border-bottom-color: rgb(248, 95, 64) !important; } .package__tile--red::before { background-color: rgb(248, 95, 64); } .package__tile--green .item__value { color: rgb(26, 188, 156); } .package__tile--green .tile__cost { border-bottom-color: rgb(26, 188, 156) !important; } .package__tile--green::before { background-color: rgb(26, 188, 156); } .package__tile .tile__img { width: 70px; height: 70px; border-radius: 50%; margin: 15px auto; } .package__tile .tile__title { text-align: center; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 10px; text-transform: uppercase; } .package__tile .tile__list { margin: 0px; list-style: none; padding: 20px 0px; border-top: 1px solid rgb(217, 217, 217); border-bottom: 1px solid rgb(217, 217, 217); } .package__tile .tile__item { display: flex; -webkit-box-pack: justify; justify-content: space-between; padding: 10px 0px; } .package__tile .tile__item .item__key { opacity: 0.7; } .package__tile .tile__footer { display: flex; -webkit-box-align: center; align-items: center; -webkit-box-pack: center; justify-content: center; -webkit-box-flex: 1; flex-grow: 1; } .package__tile .tile__cost { padding: 5px; margin-bottom: 10px; border-bottom: 3px solid; } .package__tile .tile__cost .cost__price { font-size: 20px; font-weight: 700; } .package__tile .tile__cost .cost__date { font-size: 10px; opacity: 0.7; } .package__tile .tile__plan { text-transform: uppercase; } .package__border { border-bottom: 3px dotted rgb(217, 217, 217); } .slider { display: flex; -webkit-box-align: center; align-items: center; -webkit-box-pack: center; justify-content: center; height: 190px; background: url("img/comment_bg.jpg") 0% 0% / cover no-repeat; color: rgb(255, 255, 255); } .slider__slide { display: flex; -webkit-box-align: center; align-items: center; -webkit-box-pack: center; justify-content: center; opacity: 1; transition: opacity 0.5s; } .slider__quote { font-size: 20px; margin-bottom: 20px; text-align: center; } .slider__info { display: flex; } .slider__name { font-size: 20px; font-weight: 700; } .slider__icons { display: inline-flex; -webkit-box-align: center; align-items: center; margin-left: 20px; } .slider__icon { position: relative; width: 7px; height: 7px; top: 1px; border-radius: 50%; border: 1px solid rgb(255, 255, 255); margin: 2px 10px; cursor: pointer; } .slider__icon--active { background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); } .border__think { border: 1px solid rgb(204, 204, 204); padding: 30px 35px; } .border__dotted--bottom { border-bottom: 1px dashed rgb(204, 204, 204); } .border__dotted--top { border-top: 1px dashed rgb(204, 204, 204); } .border--left-border::before { content: ""; border-left: 1px dashed rgb(204, 204, 204); min-height: 80px; margin: -30px 0px; } .border__solid--white { border: 1px solid rgb(255, 255, 255); } .border__solid--grey { border: 1px solid rgb(204, 204, 204); } .border__solid--left { border-left: 3px solid rgb(50, 147, 161); margin-left: -15px; padding-left: 15px; } .border__solid--bottom { border-bottom: 2px solid rgb(204, 204, 204); border-top: none; margin: 15px 0px !important; } .btn { color: rgb(255, 255, 255); background-color: rgb(50, 147, 161); padding: 0.75em 2em; display: inline-block; text-decoration: none; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 0.2s, color 0.2s, border-color 0.2s; text-align: center; max-width: 100%; } .btn:hover { background-color: rgb(216, 217, 222); opacity: 0.8; color: rgb(255, 255, 255); } .btn.is-disabled { background-color: rgb(204, 204, 204); cursor: not-allowed; } .btn__fill { width: calc(100% - 4em); } .btn__hover-grey:hover { background: rgb(234, 234, 234) !important; color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; } .btn--size-small { font-size: 12px; } .btn--size-large { font-size: 20px; } .btn--style-bold { font-weight: 700; } .btn--style-lighter { font-weight: lighter; } .btn--primary { background-color: rgb(9, 66, 93); } .btn--primary:hover { background-color: rgb(216, 217, 222); opacity: 0.8; color: rgb(255, 255, 255); } .btn--secondary { background-color: rgb(10, 49, 64); } .btn--secondary:hover { background-color: rgb(216, 217, 222); opacity: 0.8; color: rgb(255, 255, 255); } .btn--tertiary { background-color: rgb(216, 217, 222); } .btn--tertiary:hover { background-color: rgb(216, 217, 222); opacity: 0.8; color: rgb(255, 255, 255); } .btn--grey { background-color: rgb(144, 145, 147); } .btn--grey:hover { background-color: rgb(216, 217, 222); opacity: 0.8; color: rgb(255, 255, 255); } .btn--bordered-base { background: rgb(255, 255, 255); border: 1px solid rgb(50, 147, 161); color: rgb(50, 147, 161); } .btn--bordered-base:hover { background: rgb(255, 255, 255); color: rgb(38, 111, 122); border-color: rgb(38, 111, 122); } .btn--bordered-primary { background: rgb(255, 255, 255); border: 1px solid rgb(9, 66, 93); color: rgb(9, 66, 93); } .btn--bordered-primary:hover { background: rgb(255, 255, 255); color: rgb(5, 33, 47); border-color: rgb(5, 33, 47); } .btn--bordered-secondary { background: rgb(255, 255, 255); border: 1px solid rgb(10, 49, 64); color: rgb(10, 49, 64); } .btn--bordered-secondary:hover { background: rgb(255, 255, 255); color: rgb(3, 15, 20); border-color: rgb(3, 15, 20); } .btn--bordered-tertiary { background: rgb(255, 255, 255); border: 1px solid rgb(216, 217, 222); color: rgb(216, 217, 222); } .btn--bordered-tertiary:hover { background: rgb(255, 255, 255); color: rgb(188, 190, 199); border-color: rgb(188, 190, 199); } .btn--caps-uppercase { text-transform: uppercase; } .btn--caps-none { text-transform: none; } .btn--color-black { color: rgb(66, 66, 66); } .btn--color-white { color: rgb(255, 255, 255); } .btn--color-turquoise { color: rgb(50, 147, 161); } .btn--radius-thin { border-radius: 4px; } .btn--radius-thick { border-radius: 14px; } .btn--radius-round { border-radius: 30px; } .btn--border-bottom-thin { border-bottom: 1px solid rgb(204, 204, 204); } .btn--border-bottom-thick { border-bottom: 3px solid rgb(204, 204, 204); } .cards { box-sizing: border-box; clear: both; } .card { position: relative; padding-bottom: 30px; margin: 80px 10px; background: rgb(254, 255, 249); color: rgb(54, 54, 54); text-decoration: none; box-shadow: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.19) 0px 0px 8px 0px; border-bottom: 2px solid rgb(204, 204, 204); z-index: 2; min-height: 390px !important; } .card h5 { margin-left: 5%; margin-top: 15px !important; margin-bottom: 20px !important; } .card a { z-index: 2; color: rgb(66, 66, 66); } .card span { display: block; } .card .card-summary { padding: 5% 5% 3%; } .card .card-header { position: relative; height: 175px; overflow: hidden; background-repeat: no-repeat; background-size: cover; background-position: center center; background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.15); background-blend-mode: overlay; margin: 0px 5% 3%; } .card .card-header:focus, .card .card-header:hover { background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0); } .card .card-title { background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3); border: 2px solid rgb(255, 255, 255); padding: 3.5% 0px; color: rgb(255, 255, 255); text-transform: uppercase; position: absolute; bottom: 60px; width: 30%; left: 30%; } .card .card-title h3 { font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.2; padding: 0px 3.5%; margin: 0px; text-align: center; } .card .card-meta { max-height: 0px; overflow: hidden; color: rgb(102, 102, 102); font-size: 0.78em; text-transform: uppercase; position: absolute; bottom: 5%; padding: 0px 5%; transition-property: max-height; transition-duration: 0.4s; transition-timing-function: ease-in-out; } .card:focus, .card:hover { background: rgb(255, 255, 255); box-shadow: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.45) 0px 0px 20px 0px; } .card:focus .card-title, .card:hover .card-title { background: rgba(50, 147, 161, 0.95); } .card:focus .card-meta, .card:hover .card-meta { max-height: 1em; } .bg-cards { background: url("../img/bg-stu.svg") center center / cover no-repeat rgb(245, 246, 248); height: 460px; width: 100%; position: absolute; left: 0px; z-index: 0; margin-top: -775px; } @media (min-width: 200px) { .card .card-title { width: 50%; left: 25%; } .card { margin: 10px 0px; } .bg-cards { display: none; } } @media (min-width: 700px) { .card .card-title { width: 50%; left: 25%; } .card { margin: 10px 0px; } .bg-cards { display: none; } } @media (min-width: 769px) { .card { max-width: 100%; margin: 10px 0px; min-height: 406px !important; } .card:nth-child(2n) { margin-right: 0px; } .bg-cards { display: none; } } @media (min-width: 980px) { .card { margin: 80px 10px; } .bg-cards { display: block !important; } } @media (max-width: 700px) { .card { width: 100%; min-height: auto; } } .accordion { min-height: 0px; background-color: rgb(254, 255, 250); } .accordion p { position: relative; overflow: hidden; max-height: 800px; opacity: 1; transform: translate(0px, 0px); margin-top: 14px; z-index: 2; transition: 0.5s; } .accordion p, .accordion ul li i::after, .accordion ul li i::before { transition: 0.25s ease-in-out; } .accordion ul { list-style: none; padding: 0px; margin: 0px; } .accordion ul li { position: relative; padding: 18px 0px 4px; margin: 0px; border-top: 1px dotted rgb(220, 231, 235); } .accordion ul li i { position: absolute; transform: translate(-6px, 0px); margin-top: 9px; right: 0px; } .accordion ul li i::after, .accordion ul li i::before { content: ""; position: absolute; background-color: rgb(0, 0, 0); width: 3px; height: 16px; } .accordion ul li i::before { transform: translate(2px, 0px) rotate(45deg); } .accordion ul li i::after { transform: translate(2px, 0px) rotate(-45deg); } .accordion ul li input[type="checkbox"] { position: absolute; cursor: pointer; width: 100%; height: 100%; z-index: 1; opacity: 0; } .accordion ul li input[type="checkbox"]:checked ~ p { margin-top: 0px; max-height: 0px; opacity: 0; transform: translate(0px, 50%); } .accordion ul li input[type="checkbox"]:checked ~ i::before { margin-top: 9px; height: 9px; transform: translate(2px, 0px) rotate(45deg); } .accordion ul li input[type="checkbox"]:checked ~ i::after { margin-top: 9px; height: 9px; transform: translate(-2px, 0px) rotate(-45deg); } .accordion ul li:nth-of-type(1) { border-top: none; } .accordion ul li:last-of-type { padding-bottom: 0px; } @-webkit-keyframes bounceInUp { 0% { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(2000px); } 60% { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(-30px); } 80% { transform: translateY(10px); } 100% { transform: translateY(0px); } } @keyframes bounceInUp { 0% { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(2000px); } 60% { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(-30px); } 80% { transform: translateY(10px); } 100% { transform: translateY(0px); } } .checkbox__wrapper { display: block; position: relative; padding-left: 30px; margin-bottom: 15px; cursor: pointer; font-size: 18px; } .checkbox--hidden { display: none; } .checkbox--show { box-sizing: border-box; position: absolute; top: 2px; left: 0px; height: 20px; width: 20px; border: 1px solid rgb(221, 221, 221); border-radius: 4px; background: rgb(255, 255, 255); } .checkbox--show::after { content: ""; position: absolute; display: none; left: 7px; top: 5px; width: 3px; height: 7px; border-style: solid; border-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); border-image: initial; border-width: 0px 3px 3px 0px; transform: rotate(45deg); } .checkbox--hidden:checked ~ .checkbox--show::after { display: block; } .checkbox--primary:checked ~ .checkbox--show { background: rgb(50, 147, 161); border: none; } .checkbox--primary:disabled ~ .checkbox--show { background: rgb(255, 255, 255); border: 1px solid rgb(250, 250, 250); cursor: not-allowed; } .checkbox--primary:checked:disabled ~ .checkbox--show { background: rgb(50, 147, 161); opacity: 0.6; cursor: not-allowed; } input { appearance: none; outline: 0px; box-shadow: none; background: none rgb(255, 255, 255); } .input__border { position: relative; display: block; line-height: 3; overflow: hidden; border: 1px solid rgb(222, 222, 222); background: rgb(255, 255, 255); } .input__border input { width: 100%; height: 100%; margin: 0px; padding: 0px 0px 0px 0.5em; color: rgb(66, 66, 66); border: 0px !important; } .input__border label { display: none; } .thumbnail { max-width: 200px; } .lightbox { display: none; position: fixed; z-index: 999; width: 30%; height: 50%; text-align: center; top: 30%; left: 30%; background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3); } .lightbox img { max-width: 90%; max-height: 80%; margin-top: 2%; } .lightbox:target { outline: 0px; display: block; } .pagination { display: inline-block; padding: 0px; margin: 18px 0px; } .pagination i { color: rgb(127, 140, 141); } .pagination i:hover { color: rgb(255, 255, 255); } .pagination li { display: inline; margin: 3px; } .pagination li a { color: rgb(0, 0, 0); padding: 8px 16px; text-decoration: none; border: 1px solid rgb(221, 221, 221); } .pagination li a.active { background-color: rgb(50, 147, 163); color: rgb(255, 255, 255); border: 4px solid rgb(50, 147, 163); } .pagination li a:hover { background-color: rgb(50, 147, 163); color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; } .pagination li a:hover i { color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; } @media (min-width: 300px) { .pagination li a { line-height: 3; } } select { appearance: none; outline: 0px; box-shadow: none; background: none rgb(255, 255, 255); border: 0px !important; } .select__arrow { position: relative; display: block; line-height: 3; overflow: hidden; border: 1px solid rgb(222, 222, 222); background: rgb(255, 255, 255); } .select__arrow select { width: 100%; height: 100%; margin: 0px; padding: 0px 0px 0px 0.5em; color: rgb(66, 66, 66); cursor: pointer; } .select__arrow::after { content: "ï¸"; font: 14px / 1 FontAwesome; position: absolute; top: 15px; right: 0px; bottom: 0px; padding: 0px 1em; background: rgb(255, 255, 255); pointer-events: none; color: rgb(204, 204, 204); } .select__arrow:hover::after { color: rgb(50, 147, 161); } .select__arrow::after { transition: 0.25s; } .select select#slct option:checked, .select select#slct option:hover { color: rgb(255, 255, 255); background: rgb(97, 71, 103); } textarea { appearance: none; outline: 0px; overflow: auto; box-shadow: none; border: 1px solid rgb(222, 222, 222); background: none rgb(255, 255, 255); } .round-images__image { min-width: 200px; padding-right: 20px; } .round-images__thumbnail { border-radius: 50%; width: 250px; height: 200px; object-fit: cover; } @media screen and (max-width: 780px) { .round-images__image { text-align: center; } .round-images__thumbnail { height: 250px; } } @media screen and (max-width: 560px) { .round-images__image { text-align: center; } .round-images__thumbnail { height: 250px; } .round-images td { max-width: 350px; } } .popup { display: flex; -webkit-box-align: center; align-items: center; -webkit-box-pack: center; justify-content: center; position: fixed; width: 100vw; height: 100vh; bottom: 0px; right: 0px; background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.8); z-index: 2; visibility: hidden; opacity: 0; transition: 0.64s ease-in-out; } .popup-inner { position: relative; bottom: -100vw; right: -100vh; display: flex; -webkit-box-align: start; align-items: flex-start; max-width: 800px; max-height: 600px; width: 60%; background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); transform: rotate(32deg); transition: 0.64s ease-in-out; } .popup__photo { display: flex; -webkit-box-pack: end; justify-content: flex-end; -webkit-box-align: end; align-items: flex-end; width: 40%; height: 100%; overflow: hidden; padding: 4rem 1rem; } .popup__photo img { width: auto; height: 100%; } .popup__text { display: flex; -webkit-box-orient: vertical; -webkit-box-direction: normal; flex-direction: column; -webkit-box-pack: center; justify-content: center; width: 100%; height: 100%; padding: 4rem 4rem 0px; } .popup__text.rem-m { margin-left: -4rem; } .popup__text h1 { font-size: 2rem; font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 2rem; text-transform: uppercase; color: rgb(10, 10, 10); } .popup__text p { font-size: 0.875rem; color: rgb(104, 104, 104); line-height: 1.5; } .popup:target { visibility: visible; opacity: 1; } .popup:target .popup-inner { bottom: 0px; right: 0px; transform: rotate(0deg); } .popup__close { position: absolute; right: 0px; top: 0px; width: 3rem; height: 3rem; font-size: 18px; font-weight: 300; z-index: 4; color: rgb(255, 255, 255); text-align: center; cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none; line-height: 1.5; } .panel { margin-bottom: 20px; background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); } .panel__blue { height: 30px; background: rgb(50, 147, 163); width: 100%; position: absolute; top: 0px; } .panel__info .info__head { color: rgb(66, 66, 66); background-color: rgb(234, 234, 234); border-top-left-radius: 3px; border-top-right-radius: 3px; } .panel__info .info__title { padding: 15px; text-transform: uppercase; font-weight: 700; color: inherit; vertical-align: middle; min-width: 185px; } .panel__info .info__body { padding: 15px; } .panel__info .info__footer { padding: 15px; } .panel__info .empty__head { color: rgb(66, 66, 66); background-color: transparent; padding: 5px 15px; border: 3px solid rgb(204, 204, 204); border-top-left-radius: 3px; border-top-right-radius: 3px; } .panel__info .empty__title { padding: 15px; text-transform: uppercase; font-weight: 700; color: inherit; vertical-align: middle; min-width: 125px; } .panel__info .empty__title-small { padding: 15px; } .bx-wrapper .bx-viewport { background: rgb(255, 255, 255); } .bx-wrapper .bx-pager { display: none; } .bx-wrapper .bx-controls-auto { position: absolute; bottom: -30px; width: 100%; } .bx-wrapper .bx-loading { min-height: 50px; height: 100%; width: 100%; position: absolute; top: 0px; left: 0px; z-index: 2000; } .bx-wrapper .bx-controls-auto .bx-controls-auto-item { display: inline-block; } .bx-wrapper .bx-prev { left: 10px; } .bx-wrapper .bx-prev::before { font-family: FontAwesome; content: "ï„„"; position: absolute; left: 50%; top: 50%; transform: translate(-50%, -50%); } .bx-wrapper .bx-next { right: 10px; } .bx-wrapper .bx-next::before { font-family: FontAwesome; content: "ï„…"; position: absolute; left: 50%; top: 50%; transform: translate(-50%, -50%); } .bx-wrapper .bx-controls-direction a { position: absolute; bottom: 10px; transform: translateY(-50%); outline: 0px; width: 40px; height: 40px; font-size: 40px; z-index: 9999; background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.7); } .bx-wrapper .bx-controls-direction a:hover { opacity: 0.9; } .bx-wrapper .bx-controls-direction a:hover::before { left: 45%; } .bx-wrapper .bx-controls-direction a.bx-next:hover::before { left: 55%; } .bx-wrapper .bx-controls-direction a.disabled { display: none; } .bx-wrapper .bx-controls-auto { text-align: center; } .bx-wrapper .bx-controls-auto .bx-start { display: block; } .bx-wrapper .bx-controls-auto .bx-stop { display: block; text-indent: -9999px; width: 9px; height: 11px; outline: 0px; margin: 0px 3px; } .bx-wrapper .bx-controls-auto .bx-stop.active, .bx-wrapper .bx-controls-auto .bx-stop:hover { background-position: -86px -33px; } .table.table_theme-bg5 { background-color: rgba(237, 240, 242, 0.5); border-collapse: collapse; cursor: default; margin-bottom: 1.3rem; text-align: left; } .table.table_theme-bg5 .table__cell, .table.table_theme-bg5 .table__cell-heading { border-bottom: 1px solid rgb(236, 239, 241); transform: translateX(0px) scale(0.5); } .tippy-tooltip { position: relative; color: rgb(255, 255, 255); border-radius: 4px; font-size: 0.9rem; padding: 0.3rem 0.6rem; max-width: 350px; text-align: center; will-change: transform; -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased; background-color: rgb(51, 51, 51); } .tippy-tooltip[data-size="small"] { padding: 0.2rem 0.4rem; font-size: 0.75rem; } .tippy-tooltip[data-size="large"] { padding: 0.4rem 0.8rem; font-size: 1rem; } .tippy-tooltip[data-animatefill] { overflow: hidden; background-color: transparent; } .tippy-tooltip[data-interactive], .tippy-tooltip[data-interactive] path { pointer-events: auto; } .tippy-tooltip[data-inertia][data-state="visible"] { transition-timing-function: cubic-bezier(0.54, 1.5, 0.38, 1.11); } .tippy-tooltip[data-inertia][data-state="hidden"] { transition-timing-function: ease; } .tippy-arrow, .tippy-roundarrow { position: absolute; width: 0px; height: 0px; } .tippy-roundarrow { width: 24px; height: 8px; fill: rgb(51, 51, 51); pointer-events: none; } .tippy-backdrop { position: absolute; will-change: transform; background-color: rgb(51, 51, 51); border-radius: 50%; width: calc(110% + 2rem); left: 50%; top: 50%; z-index: -1; transition: cubic-bezier(0.46, 0.1, 0.52, 0.98); backface-visibility: hidden; } .tippy-backdrop::after { content: ""; float: left; padding-top: 100%; } .tippy-backdrop + .tippy-content { transition-property: opacity; will-change: opacity; } .tippy-backdrop + .tippy-content[data-state="visible"] { opacity: 1;
